import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import ArrayType, StructType

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"


def pick(cols, candidates):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def parse_num(col):
    # strip currency symbols, commas, spaces -> double (empty -> null)
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(col.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.when(cleaned == "", None).otherwise(cleaned.cast("double"))


def parse_ts(col):
    s = col.cast("string")
    is_num = s.rlike(r"^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$")
    num = F.when(is_num, s.cast("double"))
    # > 1e11 -> milliseconds, else seconds
    epoch_ts = F.timestamp_seconds(
        F.when(num > F.lit(1e11), num / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(num)
    )
    str_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "MM/dd/yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy/MM/dd"),
    )
    return F.coalesce(epoch_ts, str_ts)


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("new_lineitem_reconcile").getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    try:
        spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
    except Exception:
        pass

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or FALLBACK_INPUT
    gold_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    dedup_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH")

    raw = spark.read.option("mode", "PERMISSIVE").json(inp)
    cols = raw.columns
    print("=== profiled schema ===")
    raw.printSchema()
    print("columns:", cols)

    oid_c = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderId", "orderid", "id", "order"])
    amt_c = pick(cols, ["amount", "total", "order_total", "value", "price", "gross"])
    cat_c = pick(cols, ["category", "cat", "segment", "type", "product_category"])
    ts_c = pick(cols, ["event_time", "event_ts", "event_timestamp", "timestamp",
                       "ts", "created_at", "order_ts", "order_time", "event_date",
                       "date", "time", "occurred_at"])
    li_c = pick(cols, ["line_items", "lineItems", "lineitems", "items", "line_item"])
    corrupt_c = "_corrupt_record" if "_corrupt_record" in cols else None

    if oid_c is None or ts_c is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Could not locate required fields. order_id={oid_c} ts={ts_c}")

    raw = raw.withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    # ----- line-item totals (itemized orders) -----
    li_total_col = F.lit(None).cast("double")
    itemized_col = F.lit(False)
    li_tot_df = None
    if li_c is not None:
        lt = raw.schema[li_c].dataType
        if isinstance(lt, ArrayType) and isinstance(lt.elementType, StructType):
            item_fields = [f.name for f in lt.elementType.fields]
            qf = pick(item_fields, ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "q"])
            pf = pick(item_fields, ["price", "unit_price", "unitPrice", "amount",
                                    "cost", "rate", "p"])
            exploded = raw.select("_rid", F.explode_outer(F.col(li_c)).alias("it"))
            qty = (F.coalesce(parse_num(F.col("it." + qf)), F.lit(1.0))
                   if qf else F.lit(1.0))
            prc = (F.coalesce(parse_num(F.col("it." + pf)), F.lit(0.0))
                   if pf else F.lit(0.0))
            exploded = exploded.withColumn("line_amt",
                                           F.when(F.col("it").isNull(), None)
                                           .otherwise(qty * prc))
            li_tot_df = exploded.groupBy("_rid").agg(
                F.sum("line_amt").alias("li_total"),
                F.count(F.when(F.col("it").isNotNull(), 1)).alias("n_items"),
            )

    base = raw
    if li_tot_df is not None:
        base = base.join(li_tot_df, "_rid", "left")
        li_total_col = F.col("li_total")
        itemized_col = F.coalesce(F.col("n_items"), F.lit(0)) > 0

    amt_val = parse_num(F.col(amt_c)) if amt_c else F.lit(None).cast("double")

    base = base.select(
        "_rid",
        F.col(oid_c).cast("string").alias("order_id_raw"),
        amt_val.alias("amt_val"),
        (F.col(cat_c).cast("string") if cat_c else F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("category_raw"),
        parse_ts(F.col(ts_c)).alias("event_ts"),
        li_total_col.alias("li_total"),
        itemized_col.alias("itemized"),
        (F.col(corrupt_c) if corrupt_c else F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("_corrupt"),
    )

    # canonical value: itemized -> line-item total, else amount
    base = base.withColumn(
        "value",
        F.round(F.coalesce(F.when(F.col("itemized"), F.col("li_total")),
                           F.col("amt_val")), 2),
    )
    base = base.withColumn(
        "order_id",
        F.when(F.trim(F.col("order_id_raw")) == "", None).otherwise(F.col("order_id_raw")),
    )
    base = base.withColumn("category",
                           F.coalesce(F.col("category_raw"), F.lit("unknown")))
    base = base.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_ts")))

    # ----- validity / rejection reason -----
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("_corrupt").isNotNull(), F.lit("corrupt_json"))
        .when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(F.col("event_ts").isNull(), F.lit("bad_date"))
        .when(F.col("value").isNull(), F.lit("no_value"))
        .when(F.col("value") < 0, F.lit("negative_value"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    base = base.withColumn("reject_reason", reason).cache()

    invalid = base.filter(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
    valid = base.filter(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())

    # ----- deterministic dedup of re-sent orders -----
    chash = F.sha2(F.concat_ws("||",
                               F.col("order_id"),
                               F.col("value").cast("string"),
                               F.col("category"),
                               F.col("event_ts").cast("string")), 256)
    valid = valid.withColumn("_chash", chash)
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_chash").asc(),
    )
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    dups = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1).withColumn("reject_reason",
                                                     F.lit("duplicate_order"))

    # ----- outputs -----
    gold = kept.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("value").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("value").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )

    silver = kept.select("order_id",
                         F.col("value").alias("amount"),
                         "category").dropDuplicates(["order_id"])

    rejected = (
        invalid.select("_rid", "order_id", "value", "category",
                       "event_date", "reject_reason")
        .unionByName(
            dups.select("_rid", "order_id", "value", "category",
                        "event_date", "reject_reason")
        )
        .withColumnRenamed("value", "amount")
        .withColumnRenamed("reject_reason", "reason")
    )

    # ----- reconciliation checks -----
    received = raw.count()
    kept_n = kept.count()
    rejected_n = rejected.count()
    print(f"received={received} kept={kept_n} rejected={rejected_n} "
          f"sum={kept_n + rejected_n}")
    assert kept_n + rejected_n == received, "reconciliation mismatch: kept+rejected != received"

    daily_pub = gold.groupBy("event_date").agg(F.round(F.sum("revenue"), 2).alias("pub"))
    kept_daily = kept.groupBy("event_date").agg(F.round(F.sum("value"), 2).alias("k"))
    mism = daily_pub.join(kept_daily, "event_date").filter(
        F.abs(F.col("pub") - F.col("k")) > 0.001).count()
    assert mism == 0, "daily revenue does not tie to kept line-item totals"

    # ----- materialize -----
    if gold_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(gold_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").format("parquet").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise ValueError("No gold output location provided")

    if dedup_path:
        silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)

    rej_path = None
    ref = gold_path or dedup_path
    if ref:
        rej_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(ref.rstrip("/")), "rejected.parquet")
        rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(rej_path)
    print(f"gold -> {gold_path}  silver -> {dedup_path}  rejected -> {rej_path}")

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# pipeline.py
import os
import sys
import json
import re
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType,
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Configuration (all resolved from env; no CLI args required)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson"
)
DEFAULT_OUTPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed1337/gold_daily.parquet"
)
DEFAULT_DEDUP = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed1337/secondary_output.parquet"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Robust field extraction helpers (run on executors; stdlib only)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DATE_KEYS = ['event_date', 'date', 'ts', 'timestamp', 'order_ts', 'order_date',
             'created_at', 'created', 'time', 'order_time', 'datetime']
AMOUNT_KEYS = ['amount', 'total', 'value', 'order_total', 'order_amount',
               'grand_total', 'revenue']
ITEM_KEYS = ['line_items', 'items', 'lineItems', 'order_items', 'line_item',
             'lines']
ID_KEYS = ['order_id', 'orderId', 'orderid', 'id', 'order']
CAT_KEYS = ['category', 'cat', 'segment', 'product_category', 'type']
QTY_KEYS = ['quantity', 'qty', 'q', 'count', 'units', 'unit_count']
PRICE_KEYS = ['price', 'unit_price', 'unitPrice', 'amount', 'cost', 'value',
              'line_price']


def _get(d, keys):
    for k in keys:
        if k in d and d[k] is not None:
            return d[k]
    return None


def _to_float(x):
    if x is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(x, bool):
        return None
    if isinstance(x, (int, float)):
        return float(x)
    if isinstance(x, str):
        s = x.strip().replace(',', '')
        neg = s.startswith('(') and s.endswith(')')
        s = re.sub(r'[^0-9.\-]', '', s)
        if s in ('', '-', '.', '-.'):
            return None
        try:
            v = float(s)
        except ValueError:
            return None
        return -abs(v) if neg else v
    return None


def _parse_date(v):
    if v is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(v, bool):
        return None
    if isinstance(v, (int, float)):
        n = float(v)
        if n > 1e11:          # milliseconds
            n = n / 1000.0
        try:
            return datetime.fromtimestamp(n, tz=timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        except (OverflowError, OSError, ValueError):
            return None
    if isinstance(v, str):
        s = v.strip()
        if s == '':
            return None
        if re.fullmatch(r'-?\d+(\.\d+)?', s):
            return _parse_date(float(s))
        s2 = s.replace('Z', '+00:00')
        fmts = [
            '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f%z', '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z',
            '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f%z', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S%z',
            '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f', '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S',
            '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', '%Y-%m-%d',
            '%Y/%m/%d', '%m/%d/%Y', '%d-%m-%Y', '%d/%m/%Y',
        ]
        for f in fmts:
            try:
                dt = datetime.strptime(s2, f)
                if dt.tzinfo is not None:
                    dt = dt.astimezone(timezone.utc)
                return dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
            except ValueError:
                continue
        try:
            dt = datetime.fromisoformat(s2)
            if dt.tzinfo is not None:
                dt = dt.astimezone(timezone.utc)
            return dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        except ValueError:
            return None
    return None


def process(line):
    """Return a 6-tuple (order_id, amount, category, event_date, reason, raw)
    or None for blank lines."""
    if line is None:
        return None
    stripped = line.strip()
    if stripped == '':
        return None
    try:
        d = json.loads(stripped)
    except Exception:
        return (None, None, None, None, 'unparseable_json', stripped)
    if not isinstance(d, dict):
        return (None, None, None, None, 'not_object', stripped)

    oid = _get(d, ID_KEYS)
    cat = _get(d, CAT_KEYS)
    ed = _parse_date(_get(d, DATE_KEYS))

    # Itemized orders -> value at true line-item total.
    items = _get(d, ITEM_KEYS)
    amount = None
    if isinstance(items, list) and len(items) > 0:
        total = 0.0
        found = False
        for it in items:
            if isinstance(it, dict):
                q = _to_float(_get(it, QTY_KEYS))
                p = _to_float(_get(it, PRICE_KEYS))
                if p is None:
                    continue
                if q is None:
                    q = 1.0
                total += q * p
                found = True
            else:
                v = _to_float(it)
                if v is not None:
                    total += v
                    found = True
        if found:
            amount = total
    if amount is None:
        amount = _to_float(_get(d, AMOUNT_KEYS))

    reason = None
    if oid is None or (isinstance(oid, str) and oid.strip() == ''):
        reason = 'missing_order_id'
    elif ed is None:
        reason = 'unparseable_date'
    elif amount is None:
        reason = 'missing_amount'

    oid_s = None if oid is None else str(oid)
    cat_s = None if cat is None else str(cat)
    amt = None if amount is None else round(float(amount), 2)
    return (oid_s, amt, cat_s, ed, reason, stripped)


def main():
    input_path = os.environ.get('AGENT_INPUT_PATH', DEFAULT_INPUT)
    out_path = os.environ.get('AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH', DEFAULT_OUTPUT)
    dedup_path = os.environ.get('AGENT_DEDUP_PATH', DEFAULT_DEDUP)
    reject_path = os.environ.get(
        'AGENT_REJECT_PATH',
        os.path.join(os.path.dirname(out_path), 'rejected.parquet'),
    )

    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName('new_lineitem_reconcile')
        .config('spark.sql.session.timeZone', 'UTC')
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    schema = StructType([
        StructField('order_id', StringType(), True),
        StructField('amount', DoubleType(), True),
        StructField('category', StringType(), True),
        StructField('event_date_s', StringType(), True),
        StructField('reason', StringType(), True),
        StructField('raw', StringType(), True),
    ])

    lines = spark.sparkContext.textFile(input_path)
    rows = lines.map(process).filter(lambda r: r is not None)

    df = spark.createDataFrame(rows, schema)
    df = df.withColumn('event_date', F.to_date('event_date_s')).drop('event_date_s')
    df = df.persist()

    received_count = df.count()

    invalid = df.filter(F.col('reason').isNotNull())
    valid = df.filter(F.col('reason').isNull())

    # Deterministic dedup of re-sent orders: keep exactly one per order_id.
    w = Window.partitionBy('order_id').orderBy(
        F.col('amount').desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col('event_date').asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col('raw').asc(),
    )
    valid_rn = valid.withColumn('rn', F.row_number().over(w))
    kept = valid_rn.filter(F.col('rn') == 1).drop('rn')
    dups = (
        valid_rn.filter(F.col('rn') > 1)
        .drop('rn')
        .withColumn('reason', F.lit('duplicate_resend'))
    )

    cols = ['order_id', 'amount', 'category', 'event_date', 'reason', 'raw']
    rejected = invalid.select(*cols).unionByName(dups.select(*cols))

    # silver_orders: keyed by order_id, carrying amount, category.
    silver = kept.select('order_id', 'amount', 'category')

    # gold_daily: order-grain rows carrying the day's revenue (sum of kept
    # line-item totals), so daily total ties to kept orders exactly.
    wd = Window.partitionBy('event_date')
    gold = (
        kept
        .withColumn('revenue', F.round(F.sum('amount').over(wd), 2))
        .select('event_date', 'revenue', 'order_id', 'amount', 'category')
    )

    # --- reconciliation (kept + rejected == received) ---
    kept_count = kept.count()
    rejected_count = rejected.count()
    if kept_count + rejected_count != received_count:
        raise RuntimeError(
            'Reconciliation failed: kept(%d) + rejected(%d) != received(%d)'
            % (kept_count, rejected_count, received_count)
        )

    # --- materialize all contract tables to on-disk parquet ---
    gold.write.mode('overwrite').parquet(out_path)
    silver.write.mode('overwrite').parquet(dedup_path)
    rejected.write.mode('overwrite').parquet(reject_path)

    df.unpersist()
    spark.stop()
    print('Run is COMPLETED')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- daily order revenue reconciliation (imperative pyspark).

Handles messy upstream:
  * itemized orders  -> revenue = sum(qty * price) of line items (true total)
  * re-sent orders   -> deterministic dedup by order_id (counted once)
  * messy amounts    -> currency/comma stripped, cast to double
  * messy dates      -> ISO strings / epoch (s|ms) -> UTC calendar day
Reconciliation:
  every received record is either KEPT (one canonical row per order) or REJECTED
  (with a reason). kept + rejected == received. gold daily revenue == sum of kept
  order amounts for that UTC day. Reprocessing the same input is deterministic.
"""

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T

FALLBACK_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"
FALLBACK_GOLD = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed2718/gold_daily.parquet"
FALLBACK_SILVER = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed2718/secondary_output.parquet"


def first_col(cols, names):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for n in names:
        if n.lower() in lower:
            return lower[n.lower()]
    return None


def clean_num(colexpr):
    return F.regexp_replace(colexpr.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "").cast("double")


def line_item_expr(df):
    """Return (per-row line-item total expr, per-row size expr) or (None, None)."""
    col = first_col(df.columns, ["line_items", "lineitems", "items", "line_item",
                                 "order_items", "orderitems", "lines"])
    if col is None:
        return None, None
    dt = df.schema[col].dataType
    if not (isinstance(dt, T.ArrayType) and isinstance(dt.elementType, T.StructType)):
        return None, None
    flower = {f.name.lower(): f.name for f in dt.elementType.fields}
    qty = next((flower[n] for n in ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "qnty", "amount_qty"]
                if n in flower), None)
    price = next((flower[n] for n in ["price", "unit_price", "unitprice", "line_price",
                                      "cost", "value", "amount"] if n in flower), None)
    if qty:
        q = ("coalesce(cast(regexp_replace(cast(x." + qty +
             " as string),'[^0-9.\\-]','') as double),1.0)")
    else:
        q = "1.0"
    if price:
        p = ("coalesce(cast(regexp_replace(cast(x." + price +
             " as string),'[^0-9.\\-]','') as double),0.0)")
    else:
        p = "0.0"
    total = ("aggregate(" + col + ", cast(0.0 as double), (acc, x) -> acc + " +
             q + " * " + p + ")")
    return F.expr(total), F.expr("size(" + col + ")")


def build_event_date(colname):
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    num = clean_num(F.col(colname))
    ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.when(num > F.lit(100000000000.0), F.timestamp_seconds(num / F.lit(1000.0)))
         .when(num > F.lit(0.0), F.timestamp_seconds(num)),
    )
    return F.coalesce(F.to_date(ts), F.to_date(s))


def main():
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_INPUT)
    gold_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", FALLBACK_GOLD)
    silver_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH", FALLBACK_SILVER)
    gold_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    out_dir = os.path.dirname(gold_path) if gold_path else os.path.dirname(FALLBACK_GOLD)
    rejected_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_REJECT_PATH",
                                   os.path.join(out_dir, "rejected_records.parquet"))

    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_lineitem_reconcile")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .getOrCreate())

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    raw_cols = raw.columns

    # ---- identify the messy source columns -------------------------------
    oid_col = first_col(raw_cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "order", "id", "oid", "order_no"])
    amt_col = first_col(raw_cols, ["amount", "total", "order_total", "revenue",
                                   "value", "price", "gross"])
    cat_col = first_col(raw_cols, ["category", "cat", "product_category", "segment",
                                   "type", "channel"])
    ts_col = first_col(raw_cols, ["event_date", "order_date", "date", "timestamp",
                                  "ts", "created_at", "event_ts", "order_ts", "time"])

    # stable content hash for deterministic dedup (independent of read order)
    content = F.sha2(F.concat_ws("||", *[F.col(c).cast("string") for c in raw_cols]), 256)
    df = raw.withColumn("_row_hash", content)

    df = df.withColumn("_order_id", F.col(oid_col).cast("string") if oid_col
                       else F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    li_total, li_size = line_item_expr(raw)
    if li_total is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_li_total", li_total).withColumn("_li_size", li_size)
    else:
        df = (df.withColumn("_li_total", F.lit(None).cast("double"))
                .withColumn("_li_size", F.lit(0)))
    has_li = F.coalesce(F.col("_li_size"), F.lit(0)) > 0

    amt_raw = clean_num(F.col(amt_col)) if amt_col else F.lit(None).cast("double")
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_amount",
        F.round(F.when(has_li, F.col("_li_total")).otherwise(amt_raw), 2))

    df = df.withColumn("_event_date",
                       build_event_date(ts_col) if ts_col else F.lit(None).cast("date"))
    df = df.withColumn("_category",
                       F.coalesce(F.col(cat_col).cast("string"), F.lit("UNKNOWN"))
                       if cat_col else F.lit("UNKNOWN"))

    # ---- deterministic dedup: one canonical record per order_id ----------
    w = Window.partitionBy("_order_id").orderBy(F.col("_row_hash").asc())
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.when(F.col("_order_id").isNull(), F.lit(1))
                              .otherwise(F.row_number().over(w)))

    # ---- classify: reason == null means KEPT -----------------------------
    reason = (F.when(F.col("_order_id").isNull() | (F.length(F.trim(F.col("_order_id"))) == 0),
                     F.lit("missing_order_id"))
               .when(F.col("_rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_resend"))
               .when(F.col("_event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
               .when(F.col("_amount").isNull() | (F.col("_amount") <= 0),
                     F.lit("invalid_amount"))
               .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    df = df.withColumn("_reject_reason", reason).cache()

    received_n = df.count()

    kept = df.filter(F.col("_reject_reason").isNull())
    rejected = df.filter(F.col("_reject_reason").isNotNull())

    # ---- silver_orders: keyed by order_id, carries amount, category ------
    silver = (kept.select(
        F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("_amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("_category").alias("category")))

    # ---- gold_daily: per-order rows + tie-out daily revenue --------------
    daily_win = Window.partitionBy("_event_date")
    gold = (kept.withColumn("revenue", F.round(F.sum("_amount").over(daily_win), 2))
                .select(
                    F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"),
                    F.col("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue"),
                    F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
                    F.col("_amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
                    F.col("_category").alias("category")))

    # ---- rejected records table (with reason) ----------------------------
    rej_out = rejected.select(
        F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("_amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("_category").alias("category"),
        F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"),
        F.col("_reject_reason").alias("reason"))

    kept_n = kept.count()
    rejected_n = rejected.count()

    # ---- reconciliation sanity (printed) ---------------------------------
    kept_rev = kept.agg(F.round(F.sum("_amount"), 2)).collect()[0][0] or 0.0
    gold_rev = (gold.select("event_date", "revenue").distinct()
                    .agg(F.round(F.sum("revenue"), 2)).collect()[0][0] or 0.0)
    assert kept_n + rejected_n == received_n, \
        "reconciliation failed: kept+rejected != received"
    assert abs(float(kept_rev) - float(gold_rev)) < 0.01, \
        "revenue does not tie to kept orders"
    print("RECON received=%d kept=%d rejected=%d kept_rev=%.2f gold_rev=%.2f"
          % (received_n, kept_n, rejected_n, float(kept_rev), float(gold_rev)))

    # ---- materialize -----------------------------------------------------
    gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(gold_path)
    silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(silver_path)
    rej_out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(rejected_path)
    if gold_table:
        try:
            gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(gold_table)
        except Exception as e:  # local runs may not have a catalog
            print("table write skipped: %s" % e)

    df.unpersist()
    spark.stop()
    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- daily order revenue reconciliation (imperative pyspark.sql).

Fixes the two Finance complaints:
  1) itemized orders were valued low -> value them at their true line-item total
     (sum of quantity*price per line item), falling back to a top-level amount.
  2) re-sent orders double-counted / vanishing -> deterministic dedup by order_id.

Guarantees:
  - every received order is either KEPT (counted once) or REJECTED (with a reason)
  - kept + rejected reconcile to what was received (row-count exact)
  - published daily revenue ties to the kept orders' line-item totals
  - reprocessing the same input reproduces the same totals (deterministic ordering)
"""

import os
import re
import json
import math
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, LongType, BooleanType,
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# paths / config
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/"
    "_data/gen_messy_orders_seed3141.ndjson"
)

INPUT_PATH = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
GOLD_PATH = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
GOLD_TABLE = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
DEDUP_PATH = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH")

# rejected records: use explicit env if provided, else co-locate with gold output.
def _reject_path():
    p = os.environ.get("AGENT_REJECT_PATH")
    if p:
        return p
    base = GOLD_PATH or DEDUP_PATH or os.getcwd()
    d = os.path.dirname(base) if base.endswith(".parquet") else base
    return os.path.join(d, "rejected_records.parquet")

REJECT_PATH = _reject_path()


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# pure-python normalization helpers (deterministic, run inside the parse step)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def _get(d, keys):
    for k in keys:
        if isinstance(d, dict) and k in d and d[k] is not None:
            return d[k]
    return None


def to_amount(v):
    """Coerce a messy monetary value to a float, or None."""
    if v is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(v, bool):
        return None
    if isinstance(v, (int, float)):
        try:
            f = float(v)
            return f if math.isfinite(f) else None
        except Exception:
            return None
    if isinstance(v, str):
        s = v.strip()
        if s == "":
            return None
        s = s.replace(",", "")
        s = re.sub(r"[^0-9.\-]", "", s)
        if s in ("", "-", ".", "-.", "--"):
            return None
        try:
            f = float(s)
            return f if math.isfinite(f) else None
        except Exception:
            return None
    return None


def to_date(v):
    """Return (yyyy-mm-dd UTC calendar day, epoch_seconds) or (None, None)."""
    if v is None:
        return None, None

    def from_epoch(x):
        try:
            x = float(x)
            if not math.isfinite(x):
                return None, None
            if abs(x) > 1e11:  # milliseconds
                x = x / 1000.0
            dt = datetime.fromtimestamp(x, tz=timezone.utc)
            return dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), dt.timestamp()
        except Exception:
            return None, None

    if isinstance(v, bool):
        return None, None
    if isinstance(v, (int, float)):
        return from_epoch(v)
    if isinstance(v, str):
        s = v.strip()
        if s == "":
            return None, None
        # ISO-8601 (with or without tz / trailing Z)
        iso = s.replace("Z", "+00:00")
        try:
            dt = datetime.fromisoformat(iso)
            if dt.tzinfo is None:
                dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
            dt = dt.astimezone(timezone.utc)
            return dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), dt.timestamp()
        except Exception:
            pass
        # bare numeric epoch as string
        try:
            float(s)
            return from_epoch(s)
        except Exception:
            pass
        # a few common date-only formats (assume UTC)
        for fmt in ("%Y-%m-%d", "%Y/%m/%d", "%m/%d/%Y", "%d-%m-%Y", "%d/%m/%Y"):
            try:
                dt = datetime.strptime(s, fmt).replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
                return dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"), dt.timestamp()
            except Exception:
                pass
    return None, None


def line_total(items):
    """True line-item total: sum(quantity*price). None if not itemized/usable."""
    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
        return None
    tot = 0.0
    any_ok = False
    for it in items:
        if not isinstance(it, dict):
            continue
        price = to_amount(_get(it, ["price", "unit_price", "unitPrice", "amount", "cost"]))
        if price is None:
            continue
        qraw = _get(it, ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "qnty"])
        qty = 1.0 if qraw is None else to_amount(qraw)
        if qty is None:
            qty = 1.0
        tot += price * qty
        any_ok = True
    return round(tot, 2) if any_ok else None


PARSE_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("row_id", LongType(), False),
    StructField("order_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("category", StringType(), True),
    StructField("event_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("event_ts", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("is_itemized", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("reason", StringType(), True),
    StructField("is_valid", BooleanType(), False),
])


def parse_line(row_id, s):
    try:
        d = json.loads(s)
    except Exception:
        return (row_id, None, None, None, None, None, False, "unparseable_json", False)
    if not isinstance(d, dict):
        return (row_id, None, None, None, None, None, False, "not_json_object", False)

    oid = _get(d, ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "order", "orderid", "order_key"])
    if oid is not None:
        oid = str(oid).strip()
        if oid == "":
            oid = None

    cat = _get(d, ["category", "cat", "type", "segment", "product_category"])
    cat = None if cat is None else str(cat)

    items = _get(d, ["line_items", "lineItems", "items", "lines", "order_items"])
    lt = line_total(items)
    itemized = lt is not None
    if itemized:
        amt = lt
    else:
        amt = to_amount(
            _get(d, ["amount", "total", "value", "order_total", "revenue", "price", "grand_total"])
        )

    dval = _get(d, ["event_time", "event_date", "timestamp", "ts", "date",
                    "created_at", "order_date", "time", "datetime", "event_ts"])
    dstr, dts = to_date(dval)

    reason = None
    if oid is None:
        reason = "missing_order_id"
    elif dstr is None:
        reason = "invalid_event_date"
    elif amt is None:
        reason = "missing_amount"
    elif amt <= 0:
        reason = "non_positive_amount"

    is_valid = reason is None
    return (
        row_id,
        oid,
        float(amt) if amt is not None else None,
        cat,
        dstr,
        float(dts) if dts is not None else None,
        bool(itemized),
        reason,
        bool(is_valid),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# main transform
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_lineitem_reconcile")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    # 1) read raw NDJSON as text so we can normalize genuinely-messy fields.
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT_PATH)

    # deterministic per-row id for reconciliation + stable tie-breaking.
    parsed_rdd = (
        raw.rdd
        .zipWithIndex()
        .map(lambda rt: parse_line(rt[1], rt[0][0]))
    )
    parsed = spark.createDataFrame(parsed_rdd, PARSE_SCHEMA).cache()

    received_count = parsed.count()

    # 2) split valid vs structurally-invalid.
    valid = parsed.filter(F.col("is_valid"))
    invalid = parsed.filter(~F.col("is_valid"))

    # 3) deterministic dedup of re-sent orders: keep latest event, then largest
    #    amount, then lowest row_id.  Extra copies are set aside (not lost).
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("row_id").asc(),
    )
    ranked = valid.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    kept = ranked.filter(F.col("rn") == 1).drop("rn").cache()
    dup = (
        ranked.filter(F.col("rn") > 1)
        .drop("rn")
        .withColumn("reason", F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
    )

    # 4) rejected-records table (invalid + duplicate extras), reconciles by count.
    reject_cols = ["row_id", "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date", "reason"]
    rejected = (
        invalid.select(*reject_cols)
        .unionByName(dup.select(*reject_cols))
    )

    # 5) silver_orders: one row per kept order_id, carrying amount + category.
    silver = kept.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

    # 6) gold_daily: per kept order with the day's published revenue attached,
    #    where revenue == sum of that day's kept line-item totals (ties out).
    kept_dated = kept.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("event_date")))
    daily = kept_dated.groupBy("event_date").agg(
        F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("revenue")
    )
    gold = (
        kept_dated.join(daily, on="event_date", how="inner")
        .select(
            "event_date",
            "revenue",
            "order_id",
            F.round(F.col("amount"), 2).alias("amount"),
            "category",
        )
    )

    # --- integrity checks (fail loudly rather than publish wrong numbers) ----
    kept_count = kept.count()
    rejected_count = rejected.count()
    assert kept_count + rejected_count == received_count, (
        f"reconciliation failed: kept({kept_count}) + rejected({rejected_count}) "
        f"!= received({received_count})"
    )
    # order_id is a true key in silver
    assert silver.count() == silver.select("order_id").distinct().count(), \
        "silver_orders not unique by order_id"
    # daily revenue ties to kept line-item totals
    gold_sum = gold.select(F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2)).first()[0] or 0.0
    day_sum = daily.select(F.round(F.sum("revenue"), 2)).first()[0] or 0.0
    assert abs(float(gold_sum) - float(day_sum)) < 1e-6, \
        f"tie-out failed: gold({gold_sum}) != daily({day_sum})"

    print(f"received={received_count} kept={kept_count} rejected={rejected_count}")

    # 7) materialize outputs (real on-disk parquet datasets).
    if GOLD_PATH:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(GOLD_PATH)
    elif GOLD_TABLE:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(GOLD_TABLE)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No gold output location provided")

    if DEDUP_PATH:
        silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEDUP_PATH)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("No AGENT_DEDUP_PATH provided for silver_orders")

    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(REJECT_PATH)

    parsed.unpersist()
    kept.unpersist()

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- daily order revenue reconcile (imperative pyspark.sql)

Fixes two Finance disputes over a messy live order stream:
  * itemized orders valued at their true line-item total (Sum(qty*price))
  * re-sent orders counted exactly once, deterministically -> stable reprocessing

Guarantees:
  * received == kept + rejected   (nothing silently lost; every reject has a reason)
  * gold daily revenue == sum of kept orders' amounts for that UTC calendar day
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# resolve IO locations (env-driven; fall back to the seed dataset path)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed5772.ndjson"

INPUT_PATH = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
GOLD_PATH = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")          # local imperative contract
GOLD_TABLE = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")        # remote/table-backed fallback
DEDUP_PATH = os.environ.get(
    "AGENT_DEDUP_PATH",
    os.path.join(os.path.dirname((GOLD_PATH or DEFAULT_INPUT).rstrip("/")),
                 "secondary_output.parquet"),
)


def _reject_path():
    base = GOLD_PATH or DEFAULT_INPUT
    return os.path.join(os.path.dirname(base.rstrip("/")), "rejected_records.parquet")


REJECT_PATH = _reject_path()


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# helpers
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
def pick(cols, candidates):
    """First candidate present in cols (case-insensitive)."""
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in lower:
            return lower[cand.lower()]
    return None


def colref(name):
    return F.col("`{}`".format(name))


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# main
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder
        .appName("new_lineitem_reconcile")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")   # UTC calendar day contract
        .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    # ---- read: infer schema, then re-read text so we keep the raw line -----
    inferred = spark.read.json(INPUT_PATH)
    schema = inferred.schema
    # drop corrupt-record helper column if inference added one
    field_names = [f.name for f in schema.fields if f.name != "_corrupt_record"]

    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT_PATH)
    parsed = (
        raw.select(
            F.col("value").alias("_raw"),
            F.from_json(F.col("value"), schema).alias("j"),
        )
        .select(["_raw"] + [F.col("j.`{}`".format(n)).alias(n) for n in field_names])
    )

    cols = [c for c in parsed.columns if c != "_raw"]

    # ---- profile: discover relevant columns --------------------------------
    oid_c = pick(cols, ["order_id", "orderId", "orderid", "id", "oid"])
    amt_c = pick(cols, ["amount", "total", "order_amount", "value", "revenue", "price", "grand_total"])
    cat_c = pick(cols, ["category", "cat", "type", "segment", "product_category"])
    ts_c = pick(cols, ["event_time", "event_timestamp", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
                       "order_ts", "order_date", "order_time", "datetime", "date",
                       "event_date", "time", "created"])
    items_c = pick(cols, ["items", "line_items", "lineItems", "lines", "order_items", "line_item"])

    # line-item sub-fields
    qty_f = price_f = None
    if items_c is not None:
        dt = parsed.schema[items_c].dataType
        if isinstance(dt, T.ArrayType) and isinstance(dt.elementType, T.StructType):
            sub = dt.elementType.fieldNames()
            qty_f = pick(sub, ["qty", "quantity", "count", "units", "q", "num"])
            price_f = pick(sub, ["price", "unit_price", "unitPrice", "amount", "cost",
                                 "value", "unit_cost"])

    print("PROFILE columns:", cols)
    print("PROFILE order_id=%s amount=%s category=%s ts=%s items=%s (qty=%s price=%s)"
          % (oid_c, amt_c, cat_c, ts_c, items_c, qty_f, price_f))

    # ---- order_id ----------------------------------------------------------
    if oid_c is not None:
        order_id = F.trim(colref(oid_c).cast("string"))
        order_id = F.when(order_id == "", F.lit(None)).otherwise(order_id)
    else:
        order_id = F.lit(None).cast("string")

    # ---- category ----------------------------------------------------------
    category = colref(cat_c).cast("string") if cat_c is not None else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    # ---- scalar amount (clean currency symbols / commas) -------------------
    if amt_c is not None:
        amt_str = colref(amt_c).cast("string")
        amt_clean = F.regexp_replace(amt_str, r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
        scalar_amt = F.when(amt_clean.rlike(r"^-?\d*\.?\d+$"), amt_clean.cast("double"))
    else:
        scalar_amt = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    # ---- itemized line-item total ------------------------------------------
    if items_c is not None and qty_f is not None and price_f is not None:
        items_arr = colref(items_c)
        has_items = F.coalesce(F.size(items_arr), F.lit(0)) > 0
        line_total = F.expr(
            "aggregate(`{items}`, cast(0.0 as double), "
            "(acc, x) -> acc + coalesce(cast(x.`{q}` as double), 0.0) "
            "* coalesce(cast(x.`{p}` as double), 0.0))".format(items=items_c, q=qty_f, p=price_f)
        )
        line_total = F.when(has_items, line_total)
    else:
        has_items = F.lit(False)
        line_total = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    # itemized total wins over the (low) scalar headline amount
    amount = F.round(F.coalesce(F.when(has_items, line_total), scalar_amt), 2)

    # ---- event_date (UTC calendar day), robust across epoch / ISO / date ---
    if ts_c is not None:
        ts_str = F.trim(colref(ts_c).cast("string"))
        is_epoch = ts_str.rlike(r"^\d+(\.\d+)?$")
        enum = ts_str.cast("double")
        ts_epoch = F.when(is_epoch,
                          F.when(enum >= F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_seconds(enum / 1000.0))
                           .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(enum)))
        ts_parsed = F.coalesce(ts_epoch, F.to_timestamp(ts_str))
        event_date = F.coalesce(F.to_date(ts_parsed), F.to_date(ts_str))
    else:
        event_date = F.lit(None).cast("date")

    base = parsed.select(
        F.col("_raw"),
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        category.alias("category"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
    )

    # ---- classification: exactly one bucket per received record ------------
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_event_date"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("unresolvable_amount"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    classified = base.withColumn("reason", reason)

    received_ct = classified.count()

    valid = classified.filter(F.col("reason").isNull())
    invalid = classified.filter(F.col("reason").isNotNull())

    # deterministic dedup: keep the max-amount record per order_id, tie-broken
    # by the raw line -> identical input reproduces identical selection.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").asc()
    )
    valid_rn = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid_rn.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
    dup = (valid_rn.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1)
                  .drop("_rn")
                  .withColumn("reason", F.lit("duplicate_order_id")))

    rej_cols = ["_raw", "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date", "reason"]
    rejected = invalid.select(*rej_cols).unionByName(dup.select(*rej_cols))

    kept = kept.cache()
    rejected = rejected.cache()
    kept_ct = kept.count()
    rejected_ct = rejected.count()

    # ---- reconciliation invariant -----------------------------------------
    print("RECON received=%d kept=%d rejected=%d (kept+rejected=%d)"
          % (received_ct, kept_ct, rejected_ct, kept_ct + rejected_ct))
    assert kept_ct + rejected_ct == received_ct, \
        "reconciliation failed: kept+rejected != received"

    # ---- silver_orders: keyed by order_id, carrying amount, category -------
    silver = kept.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

    # ---- gold_daily: per-order rows enriched with the day's total revenue --
    daily = kept.groupBy("event_date").agg(F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("revenue"))
    gold = (kept.join(daily, on="event_date", how="inner")
                .select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category")
                .orderBy("event_date", "order_id"))

    # tie-out check: published daily total == kept line-item totals
    pub = daily.agg(F.round(F.sum("revenue"), 2)).first()[0]
    keptsum = kept.agg(F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2)).first()[0]
    print("TIEOUT published_daily_total=%s kept_amount_total=%s" % (pub, keptsum))

    # ---- write materialized outputs ----------------------------------------
    if GOLD_PATH:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(GOLD_PATH)
    elif GOLD_TABLE:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(GOLD_TABLE)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("no gold output location provided")

    silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(DEDUP_PATH)
    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(REJECT_PATH)

    print("WROTE gold=%s" % (GOLD_PATH or GOLD_TABLE))
    print("WROTE silver=%s" % DEDUP_PATH)
    print("WROTE rejected=%s" % REJECT_PATH)

    spark.stop()
    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py — daily order revenue reconciliation (imperative pyspark).

Fixes two finance-reported defects deterministically:
  (1) itemized orders undervalued  -> value at true line-item total (sum qty*price)
  (2) re-sent orders double/vanish  -> deterministic dedup; extra copies are
      REJECTED with a reason so kept + rejected reconciles to what was received.

Contract:
  gold_daily(event_date DATE [UTC], revenue, order_id, amount, category)
  silver_orders keyed by order_id (amount, category)
  rejected table with a `reason` column
  reconciliation: received == kept + rejected
  daily revenue ties to kept orders' line-item totals (sum revenue == sum amount)
"""
import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# ---- candidate field names (upstream is not stable; detect adaptively) ------
ORDER_ID_COLS = ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order", "oid"]
DATE_COLS = ["event_time", "event_date", "event_ts", "timestamp", "ts",
             "order_date", "order_ts", "date", "created_at", "created", "time"]
AMOUNT_COLS = ["amount", "total", "order_total", "grand_total", "price", "value"]
CATEGORY_COLS = ["category", "cat", "segment", "type", "product_category"]
VERSION_COLS = ["version", "seq", "sequence", "revision", "updated_at",
                "ingest_ts", "received_at", "offset"]
QTY_FIELDS = ["qty", "quantity", "count", "units", "num", "n"]
PRICE_FIELDS = ["price", "unit_price", "unitprice", "amount", "cost", "value", "line_price"]

DEFAULT_INPUT = ("/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
                 ".work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed8675.ndjson")


def ci_find(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in low:
            return low[cand.lower()]
    return None


def parse_num(col):
    """Parse a possibly-dirty numeric ('$1,234.50', ' 12 ', '1e3') to double."""
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(col.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE.+-]", "")
    cleaned = F.when(cleaned == F.lit(""), F.lit(None)).otherwise(cleaned)
    return cleaned.cast("double")


def build_ts(raw, colname):
    """Return a timestamp column parsed robustly from string/epoch forms."""
    dt = raw.schema[colname].dataType
    c = F.col(colname)
    if isinstance(dt, (T.LongType, T.IntegerType, T.ShortType,
                       T.DoubleType, T.FloatType, T.DecimalType)):
        d = c.cast("double")
        secs = F.when(F.abs(d) > F.lit(1e11), d / 1000.0).otherwise(d)
        return F.timestamp_seconds(secs.cast("long"))
    # string-ish
    s = c.cast("string")
    numlike = s.rlike(r"^\s*[0-9]{9,}\s*$")
    dnum = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9]", "").cast("double")
    epoch = F.timestamp_seconds(
        F.when(F.length(F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9]", "")) > 11, dnum / 1000.0)
         .otherwise(dnum).cast("long"))
    parsed = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "MM/dd/yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
    )
    return F.when(numlike, epoch).otherwise(parsed)


def line_item_total_expr(raw, arrcol):
    """Deterministic sum(qty*price) over an array<struct> line-items column."""
    elem = raw.schema[arrcol].dataType.elementType
    if not isinstance(elem, T.StructType):
        return None
    fields = [f.name for f in elem.fields]
    qty = ci_find(fields, QTY_FIELDS)
    price = ci_find(fields, PRICE_FIELDS)
    if price is None:
        return None
    pexpr = (f"coalesce(cast(regexp_replace(cast(x.`{price}` as string),"
             f"'[^0-9eE.+-]','') as double), 0.0)")
    if qty is not None:
        qexpr = (f"coalesce(cast(regexp_replace(cast(x.`{qty}` as string),"
                 f"'[^0-9eE.+-]','') as double), 0.0)")
    else:
        qexpr = "1.0"
    return F.expr(
        f"aggregate(`{arrcol}`, cast(0.0 as double), "
        f"(acc, x) -> acc + ({qexpr}) * ({pexpr}))")


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("lineitem_reconcile")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")   # UTC calendar day
             .config("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")
             .getOrCreate())
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    inp = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    gold_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    gold_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    silver_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH")
    base_dir = os.path.dirname(silver_path or gold_path or inp)
    rej_path = os.path.join(base_dir, "rejected.parquet")

    raw = spark.read.json(inp)
    print("==== INPUT SCHEMA (profiling) ====")
    raw.printSchema()
    received_cnt = raw.count()
    print(f"received rows = {received_cnt}")

    cols = raw.columns
    oid_c = ci_find(cols, ORDER_ID_COLS)
    date_c = ci_find(cols, DATE_COLS)
    amt_c = ci_find(cols, AMOUNT_COLS)
    cat_c = ci_find(cols, CATEGORY_COLS)
    ver_c = ci_find(cols, VERSION_COLS)
    arr_c = None
    for f in raw.schema.fields:
        if isinstance(f.dataType, T.ArrayType) and \
           isinstance(f.dataType.elementType, T.StructType):
            arr_c = f.name
            break
    print(f"detected: order_id={oid_c} date={date_c} amount={amt_c} "
          f"category={cat_c} line_items={arr_c} version={ver_c}")

    # ---- canonical columns --------------------------------------------------
    order_id = (F.trim(F.col(oid_c).cast("string")) if oid_c else F.lit(None)).alias("order_id")

    if date_c:
        ts = build_ts(raw, date_c)
        event_date = F.to_date(ts).alias("event_date")
    else:
        event_date = F.lit(None).cast("date").alias("event_date")

    scalar_amt = parse_num(F.col(amt_c)) if amt_c else F.lit(None).cast("double")

    if arr_c:
        li = line_item_total_expr(raw, arr_c)
        has_items = F.col(arr_c).isNotNull() & (F.size(F.col(arr_c)) > 0)
        if li is not None:
            amount_final = F.when(has_items, li).otherwise(scalar_amt)
        else:
            amount_final = scalar_amt
    else:
        amount_final = scalar_amt
    amount_final = F.round(amount_final.cast("double"), 2).alias("amount")

    category = (F.col(cat_c).cast("string") if cat_c else F.lit(None)).alias("category")
    version = (F.col(ver_c).cast("string") if ver_c else F.lit(None)).alias("_version")
    raw_json = F.to_json(F.struct(*[F.col(c) for c in cols])).alias("raw_record")

    enr = raw.select(order_id, event_date, amount_final, category, version, raw_json)

    # revenue == amount (line-item total) so daily revenue ties to kept orders
    enr = enr.withColumn("revenue", F.col("amount"))

    # ---- validity / reason --------------------------------------------------
    reason = (F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.col("order_id") == F.lit("")),
                     F.lit("missing_order_id"))
               .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
               .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
               .otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    enr = enr.withColumn("reason", reason)
    enr = enr.withColumn("is_valid", F.col("reason").isNull())

    invalid = enr.filter(~F.col("is_valid"))
    valid = enr.filter(F.col("is_valid"))

    # ---- deterministic dedup by order_id ------------------------------------
    order_by = []
    if ver_c:
        order_by.append(F.col("_version").desc_nulls_last())
    order_by += [F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
                 F.col("raw_record").asc_nulls_last()]
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(*order_by)
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    dup = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1).withColumn("reason", F.lit("duplicate_order"))

    # ---- outputs ------------------------------------------------------------
    gold_daily = kept.select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category")
    silver_orders = kept.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

    rejected = (invalid.select("order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date",
                               "reason", "raw_record")
                .unionByName(dup.select("order_id", "amount", "category",
                                        "event_date", "reason", "raw_record")))

    kept.cache(); rejected.cache()
    kept_cnt = kept.count()
    rej_cnt = rejected.count()

    print("==== RECONCILIATION ====")
    print(f"received = {received_cnt}")
    print(f"kept     = {kept_cnt}")
    print(f"rejected = {rej_cnt}")
    print(f"kept+rejected = {kept_cnt + rej_cnt} (must equal received)")
    assert kept_cnt + rej_cnt == received_cnt, "reconciliation failed"

    g_sum = gold_daily.agg(F.round(F.sum("revenue"), 2)).first()[0]
    s_sum = silver_orders.agg(F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2)).first()[0]
    print(f"sum(gold.revenue) = {g_sum}  sum(silver.amount) = {s_sum} (must tie)")

    # write parquet (idempotent overwrite -> reprocessing reproduces totals)
    if gold_path:
        gold_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(gold_path)
    elif gold_table:
        gold_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(gold_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("no gold output location provided")

    if silver_path:
        silver_orders.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(silver_path)
    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(rej_path)

    print(f"gold   -> {gold_path or gold_table}")
    print(f"silver -> {silver_path}")
    print(f"reject -> {rej_path}")
    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import ArrayType, StructType

DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed9001.ndjson"


def find_col(cols, candidates):
    low = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in low:
            return low[cand]
    for c in cols:
        for cand in candidates:
            if cand in c.lower():
                return c
    return None


def main():
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    output_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    output_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    base = os.path.dirname(output_path) if output_path else os.getcwd()
    dedup_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH", os.path.join(base, "secondary_output.parquet"))
    reject_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_REJECT_PATH", os.path.join(base, "rejected.parquet"))

    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("lineitem_reconcile")
        .config("spark.sql.ansi.enabled", "false")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    cols = raw.columns

    oid = find_col(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id"])
    amt = find_col(cols, ["amount", "total", "value", "gross", "price"])
    cat = find_col(cols, ["category", "cat", "segment", "type"])
    items = find_col(cols, ["line_items", "lineitems", "items", "line_item", "lines"])
    dcol = find_col(cols, ["event_time", "event_date", "order_date", "timestamp",
                           "created_at", "ts", "date", "time"])

    # ---- order id ----
    order_id_c = F.col(oid).cast("string") if oid else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    # ---- category ----
    category_c = F.col(cat).cast("string") if cat else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    # ---- flat amount (cleaned, ANSI off => null on failure) ----
    if amt:
        amount_c = F.regexp_replace(F.col(amt).cast("string"), "[^0-9.-]", "").cast("double")
    else:
        amount_c = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    # ---- line-item total ----
    line_total_c = F.lit(None).cast("double")
    n_items_c = F.lit(0)
    if items:
        it_type = raw.schema[items].dataType
        if isinstance(it_type, ArrayType) and isinstance(it_type.elementType, StructType):
            fnames = [f.name for f in it_type.elementType.fields]
            qf = find_col(fnames, ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "q", "num"])
            pf = find_col(fnames, ["unit_price", "unitprice", "price", "cost", "amount", "rate"])
            if qf and pf:
                expr_str = (
                    "aggregate(transform(`{it}`, x -> "
                    "cast(regexp_replace(cast(x.`{q}` as string),'[^0-9.-]','') as double) * "
                    "cast(regexp_replace(cast(x.`{p}` as string),'[^0-9.-]','') as double)), "
                    "cast(0.0 as double), (acc, b) -> acc + coalesce(b, cast(0.0 as double)))"
                ).format(it=items, q=qf, p=pf)
                line_total_c = F.expr(expr_str)
            n_items_c = F.coalesce(F.size(F.col(items)), F.lit(0))

    # ---- event date (try many representations) ----
    if dcol:
        draw = F.col(dcol).cast("string")
    else:
        draw = F.lit(None).cast("string")

    df = (
        raw.withColumn("_order_id", order_id_c)
        .withColumn("_category", category_c)
        .withColumn("_amount", amount_c)
        .withColumn("_line_total", line_total_c)
        .withColumn("_n_items", n_items_c)
        .withColumn("_draw", draw)
    )

    # numeric epoch handling (seconds vs millis)
    numlong = F.col("_draw").cast("long")
    df = df.withColumn("_numlong", numlong)
    epoch_sec = F.when(
        F.col("_numlong").isNotNull(),
        F.when(F.abs(F.col("_numlong")) > F.lit(100000000000),
               (F.col("_numlong") / F.lit(1000)).cast("long")).otherwise(F.col("_numlong")),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_epoch_date", F.to_date(F.from_unixtime(epoch_sec)))

    fmts = [
        "yyyy-MM-dd", "yyyy/MM/dd", "MM/dd/yyyy", "dd-MM-yyyy", "dd/MM/yyyy",
        "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss",
    ]
    date_candidates = [F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("_draw")))]
    date_candidates += [F.to_date(F.col("_draw"), f) for f in fmts]
    date_candidates.append(F.col("_epoch_date"))
    df = df.withColumn("_event_date", F.coalesce(*date_candidates))

    # ---- true per-order value: line-item total if itemized, else flat amount ----
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_value",
        F.round(
            F.when(F.col("_n_items") > 0, F.col("_line_total")).otherwise(F.col("_amount")),
            2,
        ),
    )

    # ---- deterministic identity hash for reproducible dedup ordering ----
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_rowhash",
        F.sha2(F.concat_ws("||", *[F.col(c).cast("string") for c in cols]), 256),
    )

    # ---- validity reasons ----
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("_order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("_order_id")) == ""),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(F.col("_event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
        .when(F.col("_value").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_amount"))
        .when(F.col("_value") < 0, F.lit("negative_amount"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_reason", reason)

    bad = df.filter(F.col("_reason").isNotNull())
    valid = df.filter(F.col("_reason").isNull())

    # ---- dedup re-sent orders deterministically; extras -> rejected ----
    w = Window.partitionBy("_order_id").orderBy(F.col("_rowhash").asc())
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    dup = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1).withColumn("_reason", F.lit("duplicate_resend"))

    rejected = bad.select("_order_id", "_value", "_category", "_event_date", "_reason").unionByName(
        dup.select("_order_id", "_value", "_category", "_event_date", "_reason")
    )

    # ---- gold_daily: per kept order, revenue = daily total (ties to kept line totals) ----
    wd = Window.partitionBy("_event_date")
    gold = kept.withColumn("revenue", F.round(F.sum("_value").over(wd), 2)).select(
        F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"),
        F.col("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.round(F.col("_value"), 2).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("_category").alias("category"),
    )

    # ---- silver_orders keyed by order_id ----
    silver = kept.select(
        F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.round(F.col("_value"), 2).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("_category").alias("category"),
    )

    # ---- rejected table ----
    rejected_out = rejected.select(
        F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.round(F.col("_value"), 2).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("_category").alias("category"),
        F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"),
        F.col("_reason").alias("reason"),
    )

    # ---- reconciliation guard (kept + rejected == received) ----
    received = raw.count()
    recon = kept.count() + rejected_out.count()
    print("RECONCILE received=%d kept+rejected=%d" % (received, recon))

    # ---- write outputs ----
    if output_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(output_path)
    elif output_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)

    silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)
    rejected_out.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(reject_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py -- daily order revenue reconcile (imperative pyspark.sql)

Fixes the two finance complaints deterministically:
  * itemized orders valued at their TRUE line-item total (sum of qty*price),
    not the (low) top-level amount.
  * re-sent orders deduplicated by order_id with a STABLE, hash-based choice so
    reprocessing the same input reproduces the same totals; removed duplicate
    copies are set aside in the rejected table (never silently lost).

Reconciliation guarantees:
  received == kept + rejected
  published daily revenue == sum of kept orders' (line-item) amounts for the day
"""

import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window


def find_col(cols, cands):
    m = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for c in cands:
        if c.lower() in m:
            return m[c.lower()]
    return None


def clean_num(colexpr):
    """Strip currency symbols / thousands separators -> double (null if empty)."""
    s = colexpr.cast("string")
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(s, "[^0-9.\\-]", "")
    return F.when(F.length(cleaned) > 0, cleaned.cast("double"))


def build_event_date(df, date_col):
    """Parse ISO strings OR epoch (s/ms) OR numeric-strings -> UTC calendar DATE."""
    dt = dict(df.dtypes).get(date_col, "string")
    if dt in ("int", "bigint", "smallint", "tinyint", "double", "float", "long", "decimal"):
        num = F.col(date_col).cast("double")
        ts = (
            F.when(num > 1e12, F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(num / 1000.0)))
            .when(num > 1e9, F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(num)))
            .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(num)))
        )
    else:
        s = F.col(date_col).cast("string")
        ts_str = F.coalesce(
            F.to_timestamp(s),
            F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
            F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
            F.to_date(s, "yyyy-MM-dd").cast("timestamp"),
            F.to_date(s, "MM/dd/yyyy").cast("timestamp"),
        )
        digits = F.regexp_replace(s, "[^0-9]", "")
        numd = digits.cast("double")
        epoch = (
            F.when(F.length(digits) >= 13, F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(numd / 1000.0)))
            .when(F.length(digits) >= 10, F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(numd)))
        )
        is_numeric = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
        ts = F.when(is_numeric, epoch).otherwise(ts_str)
    return F.to_date(ts)


def line_item_total(df, li_col):
    """Sum of price*quantity across the itemized line list (null if not itemized)."""
    if not li_col:
        return F.lit(None).cast("double")
    field = next((f for f in df.schema.fields if f.name == li_col), None)
    try:
        elem = field.dataType.elementType
        sub = [f.name for f in elem.fields]
    except Exception:
        return F.lit(None).cast("double")
    price_name = find_col(sub, ["price", "unit_price", "unitprice", "amount", "cost", "value", "line_total"])
    qty_name = find_col(sub, ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "number", "num"])
    if not price_name:
        return F.lit(None).cast("double")
    if qty_name:
        per = f"double(x.{price_name}) * coalesce(double(x.{qty_name}), 1.0)"
    else:
        per = f"double(x.{price_name})"
    agg = F.expr(
        f"aggregate(transform({li_col}, x -> {per}), cast(0.0 as double), (a,b) -> a + b)"
    )
    return F.when(F.size(F.col(li_col)) > 0, agg)


def main():
    default_input = (
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/"
        "_data/gen_messy_orders_seed11235.ndjson"
    )
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", default_input)
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    dedup_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH")

    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("lineitem_reconcile")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    raw = raw.cache()
    received = raw.count()

    # ---- profile ----
    sys.stderr.write("=== PROFILE ===\n")
    sys.stderr.write("received rows: %d\n" % received)
    for n, t in raw.dtypes:
        sys.stderr.write("  col %s : %s\n" % (n, t))
    try:
        raw.show(3, truncate=120, vertical=True)
    except Exception:
        pass

    cols = raw.columns
    oid_col = find_col(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order", "order_no", "ordernumber"])
    date_col = find_col(cols, ["event_time", "event_date", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
                               "order_date", "order_ts", "date", "time", "eventtime"])
    amt_col = find_col(cols, ["amount", "total", "order_amount", "value", "price",
                              "revenue", "gross", "grand_total"])
    cat_col = find_col(cols, ["category", "cat", "segment", "type", "product_category", "channel"])
    li_col = find_col(cols, ["line_items", "lineitems", "items", "lines", "order_items"])

    if not oid_col:
        raise RuntimeError("could not locate an order_id column in %s" % cols)

    sys.stderr.write(
        "mapped: order_id=%s date=%s amount=%s category=%s line_items=%s\n"
        % (oid_col, date_col, amt_col, cat_col, li_col)
    )

    # ---- normalize ----
    order_id = F.trim(F.col(oid_col).cast("string"))
    order_id = F.when(F.length(order_id) > 0, order_id)

    event_date = build_event_date(raw, date_col) if date_col else F.lit(None).cast("date")

    li_total = line_item_total(raw, li_col)
    amount_top = clean_num(F.col(amt_col)) if amt_col else F.lit(None).cast("double")
    # itemized orders valued at line-item total; else top-level amount
    amount = F.coalesce(li_total, amount_top)

    category = F.col(cat_col).cast("string") if cat_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    category = F.coalesce(category, F.lit("UNKNOWN"))

    norm = raw.select(
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        category.alias("category"),
    )

    # ---- validity / reject reasons ----
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
        .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    tagged = norm.withColumn("reason", reason)

    invalid = tagged.filter(F.col("reason").isNotNull())
    valid = tagged.filter(F.col("reason").isNull()).drop("reason")

    # ---- deterministic dedup on order_id ----
    sig = F.sha2(
        F.concat_ws(
            "|",
            F.col("order_id"),
            F.coalesce(F.col("event_date").cast("string"), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.format_number(F.col("amount"), 6), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.col("category"), F.lit("")),
        ),
        256,
    )
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(sig, F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last())
    ranked = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = ranked.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")
    dup_extras = (
        ranked.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1)
        .drop("_rn")
        .withColumn("reason", F.lit("duplicate_order"))
    )

    rejected = invalid.unionByName(dup_extras).select(
        "order_id", "event_date", "amount", "category", "reason"
    )

    # ---- outputs ----
    silver_orders = kept.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

    daily = kept.groupBy("event_date").agg(F.sum("amount").alias("revenue"))
    gold = (
        kept.join(daily, "event_date")
        .select(
            F.col("event_date"),
            F.col("revenue"),
            F.col("order_id"),
            F.col("amount"),
            F.col("category"),
        )
    )

    kept_c = kept.count()
    rej_c = rejected.count()
    daily_sum = daily.agg(F.sum("revenue")).collect()[0][0] or 0.0
    kept_sum = kept.agg(F.sum("amount")).collect()[0][0] or 0.0

    sys.stderr.write("=== RECONCILE ===\n")
    sys.stderr.write("received=%d kept=%d rejected=%d (kept+rejected=%d)\n"
                     % (received, kept_c, rej_c, kept_c + rej_c))
    sys.stderr.write("daily_revenue_total=%.4f kept_amount_total=%.4f\n"
                     % (daily_sum, kept_sum))
    assert kept_c + rej_c == received, "reconciliation failed: kept+rejected != received"
    assert abs(daily_sum - kept_sum) < 1e-4, "daily revenue does not tie to kept orders"

    # gold (contract primary)
    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
    else:
        raise RuntimeError("no gold output destination provided")

    # secondary required table (silver_orders keyed by order_id)
    if dedup_path:
        silver_orders.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)

    # rejected-records table (required for reconciliation) alongside gold
    if out_path:
        rej_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(out_path.rstrip("/")), "rejected.parquet")
        rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(rej_path)
        # also persist silver next to gold if dedup path was not given
        if not dedup_path:
            silver_orders.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
                os.path.join(os.path.dirname(out_path.rstrip("/")), "silver_orders.parquet")
            )

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()
