import os
import sys
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T, Window


DEFAULT_INPUT = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed27182.ndjson"
DEFAULT_GOLD = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed27182/gold_daily.parquet"
DEFAULT_DEDUP = "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed27182/secondary_output.parquet"


def first_present(df, names):
    lower = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for n in names:
        if n.lower() in lower:
            return lower[n.lower()]
    return None


def col_or_null(df, names):
    c = first_present(df, names)
    return F.col(c) if c else F.lit(None)


def build_line_total(df):
    """Return (line_total_col, has_items_col) using whatever array field exists."""
    li_field = None
    for cand in ["line_items", "items", "lineItems", "lines", "order_items", "order_lines"]:
        c = first_present(df, [cand])
        if c and isinstance(df.schema[c].dataType, T.ArrayType):
            li_field = c
            break
    if not li_field:
        return F.lit(None).cast("double"), F.lit(False)

    et = df.schema[li_field].dataType.elementType
    qty_name = price_name = None
    if isinstance(et, T.StructType):
        for f in et.fields:
            ln = f.name.lower()
            if ln in ("quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "n", "amount_qty"):
                qty_name = f.name
            if ln in ("price", "unit_price", "unitprice", "cost", "unit_cost", "unit_amount", "line_price"):
                price_name = f.name
    if not (qty_name and price_name):
        return F.lit(None).cast("double"), F.lit(False)

    line_total = F.expr(
        f"aggregate({li_field}, CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE), "
        f"(acc, x) -> acc + CAST(x.{qty_name} AS DOUBLE) * CAST(x.{price_name} AS DOUBLE))"
    )
    has_items = F.expr(f"{li_field} is not null and size({li_field}) > 0")
    return line_total, has_items


def parse_amount(df):
    raw = col_or_null(df, ["amount", "order_amount", "total", "grand_total", "value", "order_total"])
    s = raw.cast("string")
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    return F.when((cleaned.isNull()) | (cleaned == "") | (cleaned == "-"), None).otherwise(cleaned.cast("double"))


def parse_event_date(df):
    raw = col_or_null(df, ["event_date", "date", "order_date", "timestamp", "ts",
                           "event_time", "created_at", "order_ts", "event_ts", "time"])
    ds = F.trim(raw.cast("string"))
    long_val = ds.cast("long")
    # epoch: choose seconds vs millis by digit length
    epoch_seconds = (F.when(F.length(ds) >= 13, long_val / 1000)
                      .otherwise(long_val)).cast("double")
    ts_from_epoch = F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(epoch_seconds))
    ts_from_string = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(ds),
        F.to_timestamp(ds, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(ds, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(ds, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(ds, "yyyy/MM/dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(ds, "MM/dd/yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(ds, "dd-MM-yyyy"),
    )
    ts = F.when(ds.rlike("^[0-9]+$"), ts_from_epoch).otherwise(ts_from_string)
    # session tz is forced to UTC, so to_date yields the UTC calendar day
    return F.to_date(ts)


def main():
    spark = (SparkSession.builder
             .appName("new_lineitem_reconcile")
             .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
             .getOrCreate())

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    gold_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_GOLD)
    dedup_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH", DEFAULT_DEDUP)
    reject_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_REJECT_PATH",
                                 os.path.join(os.path.dirname(gold_path), "rejected.parquet"))
    output_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    df = spark.read.json(input_path)
    received_count = df.count()

    order_id_col = F.trim(col_or_null(df, ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "order", "oid"]).cast("string"))
    category_col = col_or_null(df, ["category", "cat", "product_category", "type", "segment"]).cast("string")

    line_total, has_items = build_line_total(df)
    scalar_amount = parse_amount(df)
    amount_col = F.when(has_items, line_total).otherwise(scalar_amount)
    event_date_col = parse_event_date(df)

    raw_cols = df.columns
    rowhash = F.sha2(
        F.concat_ws("||", *[F.coalesce(F.col(c).cast("string"), F.lit("∅")) for c in raw_cols]),
        256,
    )

    parsed = df.select(
        order_id_col.alias("order_id"),
        event_date_col.alias("event_date"),
        F.round(amount_col, 2).alias("amount"),
        category_col.alias("category"),
        rowhash.alias("_rowhash"),
    )

    reason = (F.when((F.col("order_id").isNull()) | (F.col("order_id") == ""), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
               .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
               .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
               .when(F.col("amount") < 0, F.lit("negative_amount"))
               .otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    parsed = parsed.withColumn("reason", reason)

    keep_cols = ["order_id", "event_date", "amount", "category"]

    valid = parsed.filter(F.col("reason").isNull())
    invalid = parsed.filter(F.col("reason").isNotNull())

    # Deterministic dedup by order_id; extra copies are routed to rejects (never lost).
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_rowhash").asc(),
    )
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).select(*keep_cols)
    dup_rejects = (valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1)
                        .withColumn("reason", F.lit("duplicate_order"))
                        .select(*keep_cols, "reason"))
    invalid_rejects = invalid.select(*keep_cols, "reason")

    rejected = invalid_rejects.unionByName(dup_rejects)

    kept = kept.cache()
    rejected = rejected.cache()
    kept_count = kept.count()
    rejected_count = rejected.count()

    # Reconciliation: everything received is either kept or rejected.
    print(f"received={received_count} kept={kept_count} rejected={rejected_count} "
          f"sum={kept_count + rejected_count}")
    assert kept_count + rejected_count == received_count, "reconciliation mismatch"

    # silver_orders keyed by order_id (already unique among kept).
    silver = kept.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

    # gold_daily: revenue = per-day total of kept line-item amounts, tied by construction.
    wd = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    gold = (kept.withColumn("revenue", F.round(F.sum("amount").over(wd), 2))
                .select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category"))

    gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(gold_path)
    silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)
    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(reject_path)

    if output_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)

    spark.stop()
    print("Run is COMPLETED")

import os
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T, Window


def find_col(cols, candidates):
    lc = {c.lower(): c for c in cols}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in lc:
            return lc[cand]
    for c in cols:
        cl = c.lower()
        for cand in candidates:
            if cand in cl:
                return c
    return None


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("lineitem_reconcile")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .config("spark.sql.ansi.enabled", "false")
        .getOrCreate()
    )

    in_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed31415.ndjson",
    )
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
    dedup_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_DEDUP_PATH",
        (os.path.dirname(out_path) + "/secondary_output.parquet") if out_path else None,
    )
    workdir = os.path.dirname(out_path) if out_path else os.getcwd()
    reject_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_REJECT_PATH", workdir + "/rejected.parquet")

    df = spark.read.json(in_path)
    cols = df.columns

    # ---- discover top-level columns ----
    oid_col = find_col(cols, ["order_id", "orderid", "order", "id"])
    amt_col = find_col(cols, ["amount", "order_total", "total", "gross", "value", "revenue"])
    cat_col = find_col(cols, ["category", "cat", "segment", "product_category", "type"])
    date_col = find_col(
        cols,
        ["event_time", "event_timestamp", "event_date", "order_date", "created_at",
         "timestamp", "order_ts", "ts", "date", "time"],
    )

    # ---- discover itemized array (array of struct) ----
    items_col = None
    qty_field = None
    price_field = None
    for name in cols:
        dt = df.schema[name].dataType
        if isinstance(dt, T.ArrayType) and isinstance(dt.elementType, T.StructType):
            items_col = name
            fnames = dt.elementType.fieldNames()
            qty_field = find_col(fnames, ["quantity", "qty", "units", "count", "num"])
            price_field = find_col(fnames, ["price", "unit_price", "unitprice", "cost", "rate", "amount", "value"])
            if qty_field and price_field:
                break

    # ---- order_id ----
    if oid_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("order_id", F.trim(F.col(oid_col).cast("string")))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("order_id", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    df = df.withColumn("order_id", F.when(F.col("order_id") == "", F.lit(None)).otherwise(F.col("order_id")))

    # ---- category ----
    if cat_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("category", F.col(cat_col).cast("string"))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("category", F.lit(None).cast("string"))

    # ---- scalar amount (currency-safe, non-throwing) ----
    if amt_col is not None:
        cleaned = F.regexp_replace(F.col(amt_col).cast("string"), "[^0-9.\\-]", "")
        df = df.withColumn("_scalar_amount",
                           F.expr("try_cast(nullif('X','X') as double)"))  # placeholder replaced below
        df = df.withColumn("_amt_clean", F.when(cleaned == "", F.lit(None)).otherwise(cleaned))
        df = df.withColumn("_scalar_amount", F.expr("try_cast(_amt_clean as double)"))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_scalar_amount", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # ---- line-item total ----
    if items_col is not None and qty_field is not None and price_field is not None:
        agg_expr = (
            f"aggregate({items_col}, cast(0.0 as double), "
            f"(acc, x) -> acc + coalesce(try_cast(x.{qty_field} as double), 0.0) "
            f"* coalesce(try_cast(x.{price_field} as double), 0.0))"
        )
        df = df.withColumn("_items_size", F.coalesce(F.size(F.col(items_col)), F.lit(0)))
        df = df.withColumn("_items_total",
                           F.when(F.col("_items_size") > 0, F.expr(agg_expr)).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double")))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_items_size", F.lit(0))
        df = df.withColumn("_items_total", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # itemized orders valued at their true line-item total; else scalar amount
    df = df.withColumn(
        "amount",
        F.when(F.col("_items_size") > 0, F.col("_items_total")).otherwise(F.col("_scalar_amount")),
    )

    # ---- date parsing (epoch sec/millis or various string formats), UTC ----
    if date_col is not None:
        raw = F.trim(F.col(date_col).cast("string"))
    else:
        raw = F.lit(None).cast("string")
    df = df.withColumn("_raw_date", raw)
    df = df.withColumn("_epoch_d", F.expr("try_cast(_raw_date as double)"))
    df = df.withColumn("_is_num", F.col("_raw_date").rlike("^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$"))
    secs = F.when(F.col("_epoch_d") >= F.lit(1e12), F.col("_epoch_d") / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(F.col("_epoch_d"))
    ts_num = F.timestamp_seconds(secs.cast("long"))
    ts_str = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("_raw_date")),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("_raw_date"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("_raw_date"), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("_raw_date"), "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("_raw_date"), "MM/dd/yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("_raw_date"), "yyyy/MM/dd"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_ts", F.when(F.col("_is_num") & F.col("_epoch_d").isNotNull(), ts_num).otherwise(ts_str))
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(F.col("_ts")))

    # ---- classify: reason for rejection (order matters) ----
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_date"))
        .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_reason", reason)

    received_count = df.count()

    invalid = df.filter(F.col("_reason").isNotNull())
    valid = df.filter(F.col("_reason").isNull())

    # ---- deterministic dedup on order_id; extras -> rejected 'duplicate_order' ----
    tiebreak = F.sha2(
        F.concat_ws(
            "|",
            F.coalesce(F.col("amount").cast("string"), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.col("event_date").cast("string"), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.col("category"), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.col("_raw_date"), F.lit("")),
        ),
        256,
    )
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(), tiebreak.asc()
    )
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    dup = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1).withColumn("_reason", F.lit("duplicate_order"))

    kept_count = kept.count()

    # ---- rejected table (reason column), reconciles received = kept + rejected ----
    rej_cols = ["order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date"]
    rejected = (
        invalid.select(*rej_cols, F.col("_reason").alias("reason"))
        .unionByName(dup.select(*rej_cols, F.col("_reason").alias("reason")))
    )
    rejected = rejected.withColumn("amount", F.col("amount").cast("double")) \
                       .withColumn("event_date", F.col("event_date").cast("date"))
    rejected_count = rejected.count()

    assert kept_count + rejected_count == received_count, \
        f"reconcile fail: kept={kept_count} rej={rejected_count} recv={received_count}"

    # ---- silver_orders: keyed by order_id carrying amount, category ----
    silver = kept.select(
        "order_id",
        F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
    )

    # ---- gold_daily: order grain with UTC daily revenue tying to kept line-item totals ----
    dw = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    gold = kept.select(
        F.col("event_date").cast("date").alias("event_date"),
        F.sum(F.col("amount")).over(dw).cast("double").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
    )

    # ---- write outputs ----
    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)

    if dedup_path:
        silver.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)

    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(reject_path)

    print(f"received={received_count} kept={kept_count} rejected={rejected_count}")
    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()

    main()

    """Return (items_amount_col, scalar_amount_col)."""
    li_col = qty_field = price_field = None
    for f in df.schema.fields:
        if isinstance(f.dataType, ArrayType) and isinstance(f.dataType.elementType, StructType):
            li_col = f.name
            sub = [x.name for x in f.dataType.elementType.fields]
            for cand in ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "num"]:
                if cand in sub:
                    qty_field = cand
                    break
            for cand in ["price", "unit_price", "unitPrice", "amount", "cost", "value"]:
                if cand in sub:
                    price_field = cand
                    break
            break

    if li_col and qty_field and price_field:
        agg = F.expr(
            f"aggregate({li_col}, cast(0.0 as double), "
            f"(acc, x) -> acc + coalesce(cast(x.{qty_field} as double),0.0) "
            f"* coalesce(cast(x.{price_field} as double),0.0))"
        )
        items_amt = F.when(
            F.col(li_col).isNotNull() & (F.size(F.col(li_col)) > 0), agg
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))
    else:
        items_amt = F.lit(None).cast("double")

    amount_scalar = F.lit(None).cast("double")
    amt_col = find_col(df.columns, ["amount", "order_amount", "total", "value", "revenue"])
    if amt_col is not None:
        cleaned = F.regexp_replace(F.col(amt_col).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
        amount_scalar = F.when(cleaned == "", F.lit(None)).otherwise(cleaned).cast("double")

    return items_amt, amount_scalar


def build_date(df):
    date_col = find_col(
        df.columns,
        ["event_date", "event_time", "order_date", "timestamp", "ts",
         "created_at", "date", "time", "datetime", "order_ts"],
    )
    if date_col is None:
        return F.lit(None).cast("date")

    s = F.trim(F.col(date_col).cast("string"))
    epoch = F.regexp_replace(s, r"[^0-9]", "")
    epoch = F.when(F.length(epoch) == F.length(s), epoch.cast("double")).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    epoch_ts = (
        F.when(epoch > F.lit(1e14), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(epoch / 1000000)))
        .when(epoch > F.lit(1e11), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(epoch / 1000)))
        .when(epoch > F.lit(1e8), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(epoch)))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    )

    iso_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "MM/dd/yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "yyyy/MM/dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "dd-MM-yyyy"),
        F.to_timestamp(s, "dd/MM/yyyy"),
    )

    ts = F.coalesce(epoch_ts, iso_ts)
    return F.to_date(ts)


def main():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("lineitem_reconcile")
        .config("spark.sql.ansi.enabled", "false")
        .config("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH") or DEFAULT_INPUT
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    dedup_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH")

    workspace = os.path.dirname(out_path) if out_path else os.getcwd()
    rejected_path = os.path.join(workspace, "rejected.parquet")

    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)

    # stable per-row identity for reconciliation + deterministic dedup
    raw = raw.withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

    oid_col = find_col(raw.columns, ["order_id", "orderId", "id", "orderid"])
    cat_col = find_col(raw.columns, ["category", "cat", "type", "segment"])

    order_id = F.col(oid_col).cast("string") if oid_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")
    order_id = F.trim(order_id)
    category = F.col(cat_col).cast("string") if cat_col else F.lit(None).cast("string")

    items_amt, amount_scalar = build_amount(raw)
    final_amount = F.coalesce(items_amt, amount_scalar)
    event_date = build_date(raw)

    norm = raw.select(
        F.col("_rid"),
        order_id.alias("order_id"),
        final_amount.cast("double").alias("amount"),
        category.alias("category"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
    )

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.col("order_id") == ""), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
        .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
        .when(F.col("amount") < 0, F.lit("negative_amount"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    norm = norm.withColumn("_base_reason", base_reason)

    valid = norm.filter(F.col("_base_reason").isNull())
    invalid = norm.filter(F.col("_base_reason").isNotNull())

    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(F.col("_rid").asc())
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date"
    )

    dup_rej = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date",
        F.lit("duplicate_resend").alias("reason"),
    )
    inv_rej = invalid.select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date",
        F.col("_base_reason").alias("reason"),
    )
    rejected = dup_rej.unionByName(inv_rej)

    # --- reconciliation sanity (printed, not enforced destructively) ---
    received_n = norm.count()
    kept_n = kept.count()
    rej_n = rejected.count()
    print(f"received={received_n} kept={kept_n} rejected={rej_n} "
          f"reconciles={received_n == kept_n + rej_n}", file=sys.stderr)

    # silver_orders: keyed by order_id carrying amount, category
    silver_orders = kept.select("order_id", "amount", "category")

    # daily revenue ties to kept orders' line-item totals
    daily = kept.groupBy("event_date").agg(F.sum("amount").alias("revenue"))
    gold_daily = (
        kept.join(daily, on="event_date", how="inner")
        .select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category")
    )

    if out_path:
        gold_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
    else:
        table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")
        if table:
            gold_daily.write.mode("overwrite").format("parquet").saveAsTable(table)

    if dedup_path:
        silver_orders.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)

    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(rejected_path)

    print("Run is COMPLETED")
    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pipeline.py — new_lineitem_reconcile

Imperative PySpark transform that produces trustworthy daily order revenue:
  * itemized orders valued at their true line-item total,
  * re-sent orders counted exactly once (deterministically),
  * amounts/dates normalized (UTC calendar day),
  * every received record either KEPT or REJECTED with a reason
    (kept + rejected == received),  daily revenue ties to kept line-item totals.

Materialized outputs:
  gold_daily      -> AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH (parquet)
  silver_orders   -> AGENT_DEDUP_PATH  (parquet, keyed by order_id)
  rejected        -> <gold_dir>/rejected.parquet (parquet, has `reason`)
"""

import os
import sys

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import ArrayType, StructType


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
# Configuration / environment
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
DEFAULT_INPUT = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed14142.ndjson"
)
DEFAULT_GOLD = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed14142/gold_daily.parquet"
)
DEFAULT_DEDUP = (
    "/home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/new_lineitem_reconcile__A__seed14142/secondary_output.parquet"
)


def pick(colmap, candidates):
    """Return the actual (original-case) column name matching one of candidates."""
    for c in candidates:
        if c in colmap:
            return colmap[c]
    return None


def main():
    input_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_INPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_INPUT)
    gold_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH", DEFAULT_GOLD)
    dedup_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_DEDUP_PATH", DEFAULT_DEDUP)
    output_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")  # remote/table-backed runs
    rejected_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(gold_path), "rejected.parquet")

    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("new_lineitem_reconcile")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # UTC calendar day semantics for all timestamp/date conversions.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 1. Read raw messy NDJSON
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    raw = spark.read.json(input_path)
    received_count = raw.count()

    colmap = {c.lower(): c for c in raw.columns}

    id_col = pick(colmap, ["order_id", "orderid", "id", "order", "oid"])
    amount_col = pick(colmap, ["amount", "total", "value", "order_total", "price", "revenue"])
    date_col = pick(colmap, ["event_date", "date", "timestamp", "ts", "created_at",
                             "order_date", "event_time", "time", "occurred_at"])
    cat_col = pick(colmap, ["category", "cat", "type", "segment", "product_category"])
    li_col = pick(colmap, ["line_items", "items", "lineitems", "line_item", "lines"])

    # Detect line-item struct field names (quantity / price), if present.
    qty_field = price_field = None
    if li_col is not None:
        dt = raw.schema[li_col].dataType
        if isinstance(dt, ArrayType) and isinstance(dt.elementType, StructType):
            fnames = {f.name.lower(): f.name for f in dt.elementType.fields}
            qty_field = pick(fnames, ["quantity", "qty", "count", "units", "qnty", "num"])
            price_field = pick(fnames, ["price", "unit_price", "unitprice", "cost",
                                        "amount", "value", "unit_cost"])

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 2. Canonicalize fields
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    df = raw

    # order_id (trimmed string)
    if id_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_order_id", F.trim(F.col(id_col).cast("string")))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_order_id", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_order_id",
        F.when((F.col("_order_id") == "") | F.col("_order_id").isNull(), None)
         .otherwise(F.col("_order_id")),
    )

    # scalar amount: strip currency symbols / thousands separators, keep digits . -
    if amount_col is not None:
        cleaned = F.regexp_replace(F.col(amount_col).cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
        scalar_amount = F.when(cleaned == "", None).otherwise(cleaned.cast("double"))
    else:
        scalar_amount = F.lit(None).cast("double")
    df = df.withColumn("_scalar_amount", scalar_amount)

    # line-item total via aggregate over the array
    if li_col is not None and qty_field is not None and price_field is not None:
        li_total = F.expr(
            f"aggregate("
            f"  transform(`{li_col}`, x -> "
            f"    coalesce(cast(x.`{qty_field}` as double), 0.0) * "
            f"    coalesce(cast(x.`{price_field}` as double), 0.0)), "
            f"  cast(0.0 as double), (acc, v) -> acc + v)"
        )
        has_items = F.expr(f"`{li_col}` is not null and size(`{li_col}`) > 0")
        df = df.withColumn("_has_items", has_items)
        df = df.withColumn("_li_total", F.when(has_items, li_total))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_has_items", F.lit(False))
        df = df.withColumn("_li_total", F.lit(None).cast("double"))

    # authoritative amount: line-item total when itemized, else scalar amount
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_amount",
        F.round(
            F.when(F.col("_has_items"), F.col("_li_total")).otherwise(F.col("_scalar_amount")),
            2,
        ),
    )

    # category
    if cat_col is not None:
        df = df.withColumn(
            "_category",
            F.coalesce(F.trim(F.col(cat_col).cast("string")), F.lit("UNKNOWN")),
        )
        df = df.withColumn(
            "_category",
            F.when(F.col("_category") == "", F.lit("UNKNOWN")).otherwise(F.col("_category")),
        )
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_category", F.lit("UNKNOWN"))

    # event_date -> UTC calendar day, from epoch (s/ms) or ISO/plain string
    if date_col is not None:
        s = F.trim(F.col(date_col).cast("string"))
        num = F.when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]+$"), s.cast("long"))
        ts_epoch = (
            F.when(num.isNull(), None)
             .when(num > F.lit(100000000000), (num / F.lit(1000)).cast("timestamp"))  # millis
             .otherwise(num.cast("timestamp"))                                        # seconds
        )
        ts = F.coalesce(ts_epoch, F.to_timestamp(s))
        df = df.withColumn("_event_date", F.to_date(ts))
    else:
        df = df.withColumn("_event_date", F.lit(None).cast("date"))

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 3. Validity: first failing rule wins -> reason
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("_order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("_amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
         .when(F.col("_amount") <= 0, F.lit("non_positive_amount"))
         .when(F.col("_event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_reason", reason)

    valid = df.filter(F.col("_reason").isNull())
    invalid = df.filter(F.col("_reason").isNotNull())

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 4. Deterministic dedup of re-sent orders
    #    Extra copies are NOT lost: they are rejected as duplicate_resend.
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    valid = valid.withColumn(
        "_rowhash", F.sha2(F.to_json(F.struct(*valid.columns)), 256)
    )
    w = Window.partitionBy("_order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_category").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_rowhash").asc(),
    )
    valid = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    kept = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    dup_rejects = valid.filter(F.col("_rn") > 1).withColumn(
        "_reason", F.lit("duplicate_resend")
    )

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 5. Build contract outputs
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    reject_cols = ["_order_id", "_amount", "_category", "_event_date", "_reason"]
    rejected = (
        invalid.select(*reject_cols)
        .unionByName(dup_rejects.select(*reject_cols))
        .select(
            F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
            F.col("_amount").alias("amount"),
            F.col("_category").alias("category"),
            F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"),
            F.col("_reason").alias("reason"),
        )
    )

    silver_orders = kept.select(
        F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("_amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("_category").alias("category"),
    )

    # gold_daily: per kept order enriched with the day's total revenue.
    daily = Window.partitionBy("_event_date")
    gold_daily = (
        kept.withColumn("revenue", F.round(F.sum("_amount").over(daily), 2))
        .select(
            F.col("_event_date").alias("event_date"),
            F.col("revenue"),
            F.col("_order_id").alias("order_id"),
            F.col("_amount").alias("amount"),
            F.col("_category").alias("category"),
        )
    )

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 6. Reconciliation invariants (fail loudly rather than silently drift)
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    kept_count = kept.count()
    rejected_count = rejected.count()
    assert kept_count + rejected_count == received_count, (
        f"reconcile failed: kept({kept_count}) + rejected({rejected_count}) "
        f"!= received({received_count})"
    )

    kept_total = kept.agg(F.round(F.sum("_amount"), 2)).first()[0] or 0.0
    gold_total = (
        gold_daily.groupBy("event_date").agg(F.first("revenue").alias("r"))
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("r"), 2)).first()[0] or 0.0
    )
    assert abs(float(kept_total) - float(gold_total)) < 1e-6, (
        f"revenue tie-out failed: kept={kept_total} gold={gold_total}"
    )

    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    # 7. Materialize
    # ----------------------------------------------------------------------- #
    gold_daily.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(gold_path)
    silver_orders.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(dedup_path)
    rejected.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(rejected_path)

    if output_table:
        gold_daily.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(output_table)

    print(f"received={received_count} kept={kept_count} rejected={rejected_count} "
          f"revenue={float(kept_total):.2f}")
    print("Run is COMPLETED")

    spark.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed42.ndjson"

ITEM = "STRUCT<qty:STRING,quantity:STRING,count:STRING,price:STRING,unit_price:STRING,amount:STRING>"
ORDER_SCHEMA = f"""
order_id STRING,
event_time STRING, event_ts STRING, ts STRING, order_ts STRING, order_date STRING,
event_date STRING, created_at STRING, timestamp STRING, order_time STRING, date STRING,
amount STRING, total STRING, order_amount STRING, order_total STRING, grand_total STRING,
category STRING, cat STRING, segment STRING, product_category STRING, type STRING,
line_items ARRAY<{ITEM}>, items ARRAY<{ITEM}>, lines ARRAY<{ITEM}>
"""

NUM_RE = r'^-?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'


def _to_num(c):
    cleaned = F.regexp_replace(c.cast("string"), r'[^0-9.\-]', '')
    return F.when(cleaned.rlike(NUM_RE), cleaned.cast("double")).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("double"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="normalized_orders")
def normalized_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA_PATH)
    parsed = raw.select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw_line"),
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), ORDER_SCHEMA).alias("j"),
    )
    b = parsed.select("raw_line", "j.*")

    ts_cols = ["event_time", "event_ts", "ts", "order_ts", "order_date",
               "event_date", "created_at", "timestamp", "order_time", "date"]
    amt_cols = ["amount", "total", "order_amount", "order_total", "grand_total"]
    cat_cols = ["category", "cat", "segment", "product_category", "type"]
    items_cols = ["line_items", "items", "lines"]

    raw_ts = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in ts_cols])
    raw_amt = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in amt_cols])
    raw_cat = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cat_cols])
    items = F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in items_cols])

    def item_value(x):
        qty = F.coalesce(_to_num(F.coalesce(x["qty"], x["quantity"], x["count"])), F.lit(1.0))
        price = F.coalesce(_to_num(F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"], x["amount"])), F.lit(0.0))
        return qty * price

    line_total = F.aggregate(items, F.lit(0.0), lambda acc, x: acc + item_value(x))
    has_items = items.isNotNull() & (F.size(items) > 0)
    order_amount = F.when(has_items, line_total).otherwise(_to_num(raw_amt))

    stg = b.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.when(F.length(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.lit("")))) > 0,
               F.trim(F.col("order_id"))).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("order_id"),
        raw_ts.alias("raw_ts"),
        order_amount.alias("amount"),
        raw_cat.alias("category"),
    )

    ts = (F.when(F.col("raw_ts").rlike(r'^[0-9]{13}$'),
                 F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("raw_ts").cast("long") / F.lit(1000)))
            .when(F.col("raw_ts").rlike(r'^[0-9]{10}$'),
                 F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("raw_ts").cast("long")))
            .otherwise(F.expr("try_to_timestamp(raw_ts)")))
    event_date = F.to_date(ts)

    reason = (F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
                .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
                .when(event_date.isNull(), F.lit("invalid_date"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))

    return stg.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        F.round(F.col("amount"), 2).alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
        reason.alias("reason"),
    )


def _kept(spark):
    n = spark.read.table("normalized_orders")
    valid = n.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(F.col("raw_line"))
    return valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return _kept(spark).select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    kept = _kept(spark)
    return kept.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    n = spark.read.table("normalized_orders")
    invalid = n.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull()).select(
        "raw_line", "order_id", "event_date", "amount", "category", "reason")
    valid = n.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(F.col("raw_line"))
    dups = (valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                 .where(F.col("_rn") > 1)
                 .withColumn("reason", F.lit("duplicate_resend"))
                 .select("raw_line", "order_id", "event_date", "amount", "category", "reason"))
    return invalid.unionByName(dups)

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, ArrayType,
)

SRC = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed2718.ndjson"

# Explicit schema => NO inference job (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS_IN_PIPELINE_QUERY_FUNCTION).
_ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", DoubleType()),
    StructField("qty", DoubleType()),
    StructField("price", DoubleType()),
    StructField("unit_price", DoubleType()),
])
_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("total", DoubleType()),
    StructField("order_total", DoubleType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("cat", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("order_date", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
])

# tz-independent UTC calendar day: epoch-seconds -> days since 1970-01-01
_EV = """
CASE
  WHEN raw_ts RLIKE '^[0-9]{13,}$'
    THEN date_add(DATE'1970-01-01', CAST(floor(CAST(raw_ts AS DOUBLE)/1000/86400) AS INT))
  WHEN raw_ts RLIKE '^[0-9]{10,12}$'
    THEN date_add(DATE'1970-01-01', CAST(floor(CAST(raw_ts AS DOUBLE)/86400) AS INT))
  ELSE date_add(DATE'1970-01-01', CAST(floor(CAST(to_timestamp(raw_ts) AS DOUBLE)/86400) AS INT))
END
"""

_LINE_TOTAL = ("aggregate(li, CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE), (acc, x) -> acc + "
               "coalesce(x.quantity, x.qty, CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)) * "
               "coalesce(x.price, x.unit_price, CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)))")


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    # Explicit schema -> unresolved batch plan, no inference execution.
    return SparkSession.active().read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(SRC)


@dp.materialized_view(name="normalized_orders")
def normalized_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders")

    df = df.withColumn("li", F.coalesce(F.col("line_items"), F.col("items")))
    df = df.withColumn("n_items",
                       F.when(F.col("li").isNull(), F.lit(0)).otherwise(F.size("li")))
    df = df.withColumn("line_total", F.expr(_LINE_TOTAL))
    df = df.withColumn("amount_scalar",
                       F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("total"), F.col("order_total")))

    # itemized -> line-item total; else scalar amount
    df = df.withColumn(
        "final_amount",
        F.when(F.col("n_items") > 0, F.col("line_total")).otherwise(F.col("amount_scalar")),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("oid", F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.col("id")))
    df = df.withColumn("cat_f", F.coalesce(F.col("category"), F.col("cat")))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "raw_ts",
        F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("string") for c in
                     ["event_time", "timestamp", "ts", "event_date",
                      "date", "created_at", "order_date"]]),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("ev_date", F.expr(_EV))

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("oid").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("oid")) == F.lit("")),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("final_amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
         .when(F.col("ev_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    return df.select(
        F.col("oid").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("final_amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("cat_f").alias("category"),
        F.col("ev_date").alias("event_date"),
        reason.alias("reject_reason"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="valid_ranked")
def valid_ranked():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.normalized_orders")
    df = df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
    )
    return df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))


@dp.materialized_view(name="kept_orders")
def kept_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.valid_ranked")
    return df.where(F.col("rn") == 1).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    # keyed by order_id (unique after dedup), carrying amount, category
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.kept_orders")
    return df.select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    invalid = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.normalized_orders")
               .where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
               .select("order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date",
                       F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason")))
    dups = (spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.valid_ranked")
            .where(F.col("rn") > 1)
            .select("order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date",
                    F.lit("duplicate_resend").alias("reason")))
    # kept (rn=1) + rejected(invalid + duplicates) == received rows -> reconciles
    return invalid.unionByName(dups)


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.kept_orders")
    w = Window.partitionBy("event_date")
    return (df.withColumn("revenue", F.sum("amount").over(w))
              .select("event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, ArrayType,
)

DATA = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
        ".work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed3141.ndjson")

# Broad line-item element schema (covers common field-name variants).
ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("qty", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("price", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("unit_price", DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType(), True),
])

# Superset schema -> from_json yields nulls for absent fields (no inference job).
SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("orderId", StringType(), True),
    StructField("amount", StringType(), True),
    StructField("total", StringType(), True),
    StructField("order_total", StringType(), True),
    StructField("value", StringType(), True),
    StructField("category", StringType(), True),
    StructField("cat", StringType(), True),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(ITEM), True),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(ITEM), True),
    StructField("lineItems", ArrayType(ITEM), True),
    StructField("ts", StringType(), True),
    StructField("event_time", StringType(), True),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType(), True),
    StructField("created_at", StringType(), True),
    StructField("order_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("date", StringType(), True),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_bronze")
def orders_bronze():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA)  # lazy; one row per NDJSON line (nothing dropped)
    d = raw.select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw_line"),
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("j"),
    )

    oid = F.coalesce(F.col("j.order_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("j.orderId"))
    cat = F.coalesce(F.col("j.category"), F.col("j.cat"))
    items = F.coalesce(F.col("j.items"), F.col("j.line_items"), F.col("j.lineItems"))
    has_items = items.isNotNull() & (F.size(items) > 0)

    line_total = F.aggregate(
        items,
        F.lit(0.0),
        lambda acc, x: acc + (
            F.coalesce(x["quantity"], x["qty"], F.lit(1.0))
            * F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"], x["amount"], F.lit(0.0))
        ),
    )

    amt_str = F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.amount"), F.col("j.total"), F.col("j.order_total"), F.col("j.value")
    )
    amt_clean = F.regexp_replace(amt_str, r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    parsed_amount = F.when(amt_clean == "", F.lit(None)).otherwise(amt_clean.cast("double"))

    order_value = F.when(has_items, line_total).otherwise(parsed_amount).cast("double")

    # UTC calendar day derived tz-independently from epoch seconds.
    ts_str = F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"),
        F.col("j.created_at"), F.col("j.order_date"), F.col("j.date"),
    )
    is_num = ts_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]+$")
    num = ts_str.cast("double")
    epoch_num = F.when(num >= F.lit(1e12), num / 1000.0).otherwise(num)
    epoch_ts = F.to_timestamp(ts_str).cast("long").cast("double")
    epoch_sec = F.when(is_num, epoch_num).otherwise(epoch_ts)
    day = F.floor(epoch_sec / 86400.0)
    event_date = F.when(
        day.isNotNull(),
        F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day.cast("int")),
    )

    return d.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.sha2(F.coalesce(F.col("raw_line"), F.lit("")), 256).alias("row_hash"),
        oid.alias("order_id"),
        cat.alias("category"),
        order_value.alias("order_value"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_classified")
def orders_classified():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    b = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_bronze")

    # Deterministic pick among re-sends: highest value, earliest date, stable hash.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("order_value").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("row_hash").asc(),
    )
    ranked = b.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == ""),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("missing_date"))
         .when(F.col("order_value").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None))
    )

    return ranked.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("category"),
        F.col("order_value"),
        F.col("event_date"),
        reason.alias("reject_reason"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_classified")
    return (
        c.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
         .select(
             F.col("order_id"),
             F.col("order_value").alias("amount"),
             F.col("category"),
             F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason"),
             F.col("raw_line"),
         )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_classified")
    # reject_reason IS NULL => kept, and dedup guarantees one row per order_id.
    return (
        c.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
         .select(
             F.col("order_id"),
             F.col("order_value").alias("amount"),
             F.col("category"),
         )
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    c = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_classified")
    kept = c.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    daily = F.sum("order_value").over(Window.partitionBy("event_date"))
    return kept.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        daily.alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("order_value").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, ArrayType

DATA_PATH = (
    "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/"
    ".work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed5772.ndjson"
)

# Item shape covers common field-name variants; absent fields resolve to null.
_ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", StringType()),
    StructField("qty", StringType()),
    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("unit_price", StringType()),
    StructField("unitPrice", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
])

# Explicit schema => no inference scan (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS). Numbers read as strings.
_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("orderId", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("order_amount", StringType()),
    StructField("total", StringType()),
    StructField("value", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("cat", StringType()),
    StructField("segment", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("order_date", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
    StructField("lineItems", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
])

_LI_TOTAL = (
    "aggregate(_li, cast(0.0 as double), (acc, x) -> acc + "
    "coalesce(cast(x.quantity as double), cast(x.qty as double), cast(1.0 as double)) * "
    "coalesce(cast(x.price as double), cast(x.unit_price as double), "
    "cast(x.unitPrice as double), cast(x.amount as double), cast(0.0 as double)))"
)

_PARSED_TS = (
    "coalesce("
    "case when _ts_raw rlike '^[0-9]{13}$' then timestamp_millis(cast(_ts_raw as long)) end,"
    "case when _ts_raw rlike '^[0-9]{10}$' then timestamp_seconds(cast(_ts_raw as long)) end,"
    "try_to_timestamp(_ts_raw),"
    "try_to_timestamp(_ts_raw, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),"
    "try_to_timestamp(_ts_raw, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),"
    "try_to_timestamp(_ts_raw, 'MM/dd/yyyy')"
    ")"
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_scored")
def orders_scored():
    # Every received record is retained here and tagged kept/rejected -> reconciliation holds.
    df = SparkSession.active().read.schema(_SCHEMA).json(DATA_PATH)

    df = (df
          .withColumn("_oid", F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("orderId")))
          .withColumn("_cat", F.coalesce(F.col("category"), F.col("cat"), F.col("segment")))
          .withColumn("_amt_raw", F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("order_amount"),
                                             F.col("total"), F.col("value")))
          .withColumn("_ts_raw", F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("timestamp"),
                                            F.col("ts"), F.col("order_date"),
                                            F.col("created_at"), F.col("date"),
                                            F.col("event_date")))
          .withColumn("_li", F.coalesce(F.col("line_items"), F.col("items"), F.col("lineItems"))))

    amt = F.regexp_replace(F.col("_amt_raw"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "").cast("double")
    has_items = F.col("_li").isNotNull() & (F.size(F.col("_li")) > 0)
    final_amt = F.round(F.when(has_items, F.expr(_LI_TOTAL)).otherwise(amt), 2)
    edate = F.to_date(F.expr(_PARSED_TS))

    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", F.col("_oid"))
          .withColumn("category", F.col("_cat"))
          .withColumn("amount", final_amt)
          .withColumn("event_date", edate))

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == ""),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_amount"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_base_reason", base_reason)
    df = df.withColumn("is_valid", F.col("_base_reason").isNull())

    # Deterministic dedup key from raw content -> reprocessing reproduces the same choice.
    df = df.withColumn("_dedup_key", F.sha2(F.concat_ws("||",
                        F.coalesce(F.col("_oid"), F.lit("")),
                        F.coalesce(F.col("_amt_raw"), F.lit("")),
                        F.coalesce(F.col("_ts_raw"), F.lit("")),
                        F.coalesce(F.col("_cat"), F.lit("")),
                        F.coalesce(F.col("amount").cast("string"), F.lit("")),
                        F.coalesce(F.to_json(F.col("_li")), F.lit(""))), 256))

    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("is_valid").desc(), F.col("_dedup_key").asc())
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    reject_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("_base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("_base_reason"))
         .when(F.col("_rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_resend"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("reject_reason", reject_reason)
    df = df.withColumn("is_kept", F.col("reject_reason").isNull())

    return df.select(
        "order_id", "category", "amount", "event_date",
        "reject_reason", "is_kept",
        F.col("_amt_raw").alias("amount_raw"),
        F.col("_ts_raw").alias("date_raw"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_scored")
    return df.where(F.col("is_kept")).select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_scored")
    return (df.where(F.col("is_kept"))
              .select(
                  F.col("event_date"),
                  F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
                  F.col("order_id"),
                  F.col("amount"),
                  F.col("category"),
              ))


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_scored")
    return (df.where(~F.col("is_kept"))
              .select(
                  "order_id", "category", "amount", "event_date",
                  "amount_raw", "date_raw",
                  F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason"),
              ))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, ArrayType

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed8675.ndjson"

ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", StringType()),
    StructField("qty", StringType()),
    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("unit_price", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
])

SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("orderId", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("total", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(ITEM)),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(ITEM)),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
])

# line-item total, all conversions via try_cast so malformed values -> 0.0 (never throw)
LINE_TOTAL_EXPR = """
aggregate(
  items_arr,
  cast(0.0 as double),
  (acc, x) -> acc
    + coalesce(try_cast(x.quantity as double), try_cast(x.qty as double), cast(0.0 as double))
    * coalesce(try_cast(x.price as double), try_cast(x.unit_price as double), try_cast(x.amount as double), cast(0.0 as double))
)
"""

# deterministic dedup ordering (unique enough via raw_line tie-break) -> reproducible reprocessing
def _dedup_window():
    return Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("event_date").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("raw_line").asc_nulls_last(),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA_PATH)
    j = raw.select(
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("d"),
        F.col("value").alias("raw_line"),
    )
    f = j.select("raw_line", "d.*")
    f = f.withColumn("order_id_c", F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("orderId")))
    f = f.withColumn("items_arr", F.coalesce(F.col("line_items"), F.col("items")))
    f = f.withColumn("has_items", F.expr("coalesce(size(items_arr), 0) > 0"))
    f = f.withColumn("line_total", F.expr(LINE_TOTAL_EXPR))
    f = f.withColumn(
        "amount_num",
        F.expr("try_cast(regexp_replace(coalesce(amount, total, ''), '[^0-9.-]', '') as double)"),
    )
    f = f.withColumn(
        "amount_c",
        F.when(F.col("has_items"), F.col("line_total")).otherwise(F.col("amount_num")),
    )
    f = f.withColumn(
        "date_raw",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("event_date"), F.col("date"), F.col("timestamp"),
            F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("created_at"),
        ),
    )
    f = f.withColumn(
        "event_date_c",
        F.expr("to_date(coalesce(try_cast(date_raw as timestamp), try_cast(date_raw as date)))"),
    )
    f = f.withColumn("category_c", F.coalesce(F.col("category"), F.lit("UNKNOWN")))

    reason = (
        F.when((F.col("order_id_c").isNull()) | (F.trim(F.col("order_id_c")) == ""),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount_c").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date_c").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast(StringType()))
    )
    f = f.withColumn("structural_reason", reason)

    return f.select(
        F.col("order_id_c").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("amount_c").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category_c").alias("category"),
        F.col("event_date_c").alias("event_date"),
        F.col("structural_reason"),
        F.col("raw_line"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="kept_orders")
def kept_orders():
    b = SparkSession.active().read.table("bronze_orders").where(F.col("structural_reason").isNull())
    ranked = b.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(_dedup_window()))
    return ranked.where(F.col("rn") == 1).select("order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date")


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, ArrayType

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed9001.ndjson"

ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", StringType()),
    StructField("qty", StringType()),
    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("unit_price", StringType()),
])

SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(ITEM)),
])


def _num(c):
    # tolerate "$12.50", "12,50"->kept digits, plain numbers, or numeric JSON read as string
    return F.regexp_replace(c.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "").cast("double")


@dp.materialized_view(name="annotated_orders")
def annotated_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA_PATH)

    ts_str = F.coalesce(
        F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"),
        F.col("event_date"), F.col("date"),
    ).cast("string")

    ts_parsed = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str, "MM/dd/yyyy"),
    )

    # instant epoch seconds (tz-independent once we have a timestamp / numeric epoch)
    epoch = F.coalesce(
        F.when(ts_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]{13}$"), (ts_str.cast("long") / F.lit(1000)).cast("long")),
        F.when(ts_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]{10}$"), ts_str.cast("long")),
        ts_parsed.cast("long"),
    )

    # UTC calendar day WITHOUT mutating session tz: days since 1970-01-01
    days = F.floor(epoch / F.lit(86400)).cast("int")
    evt_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), days)

    def _item_val(x):
        q = F.coalesce(_num(F.coalesce(x["quantity"], x["qty"])), F.lit(1.0))
        p = F.coalesce(_num(F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"])), F.lit(0.0))
        return q * p

    line_total = F.aggregate(F.col("line_items"), F.lit(0.0), lambda acc, x: acc + _item_val(x))
    has_items = F.col("line_items").isNotNull() & (F.size("line_items") > 0)
    order_amount = F.round(
        F.when(has_items, line_total).otherwise(_num(F.col("amount"))), 2
    )

    base = raw.select(
        F.col("order_id").cast("string").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
        evt_date.alias("event_date"),
        order_amount.alias("amount"),
    )

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_or_unparseable_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("missing_or_unparseable_date"))
         .when(F.col("amount") <= F.lit(0.0), F.lit("non_positive_amount"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    b2 = base.withColumn("base_reason", base_reason)

    # deterministic, idempotent dedup: valid rows first, then a stable total order
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNull(), F.lit(0)).otherwise(F.lit(1)),
        F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount").asc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
    )
    b3 = b2.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    final_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_resend"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

    # exactly one row per received record -> kept ∪ rejected reconciles to received
    return b3.withColumn("reason", final_reason).select(
        "order_id", "category", "event_date", "amount", "reason"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    a = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.annotated_orders")
    return a.where(F.col("reason").isNull()).select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    a = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.annotated_orders")
    kept = a.where(F.col("reason").isNull())
    daily_rev = F.round(F.sum("amount").over(Window.partitionBy("event_date")), 2)
    return kept.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        daily_rev.alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    return a.where(F.col("reason").isNotNull()).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date", F.col("reason")
    )

# Best-effort: interpret/emit calendar days in UTC (mutable session setting, not platform config)
try:

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed11235.ndjson"

_item = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", StringType()),
    StructField("qty", StringType()),
    StructField("count", StringType()),
    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("unit_price", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
])
_schema = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("total", StringType()),
    StructField("value", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("order_date", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("currency", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(_item)),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(_item)),
])

# true line-item total: sum(qty * price); qty defaults to 1, price to 0; all try_cast (never throws)
_line_total_expr = """
CASE WHEN items IS NOT NULL AND size(items) > 0 THEN
  aggregate(
    transform(items, x ->
      coalesce(try_cast(regexp_replace(coalesce(x.quantity, x.qty, x.count), '[^0-9eE.+-]', '') as double), 1.0) *
      coalesce(try_cast(regexp_replace(coalesce(x.price, x.unit_price, x.amount), '[^0-9eE.+-]', '') as double), 0.0)
    ),
    cast(0.0 as double),
    (acc, v) -> acc + v
  )
ELSE NULL END
"""

_stated_expr = "try_cast(regexp_replace(amount_str, '[^0-9eE.+-]', '') as double)"

_date_expr = """
coalesce(
  try_cast(raw_date as date),
  to_date(try_cast(raw_date as timestamp)),
  CASE WHEN try_cast(raw_date as long) IS NOT NULL THEN
    CASE WHEN abs(try_cast(raw_date as long)) > 100000000000
         THEN to_date(timestamp_millis(try_cast(raw_date as long)))
         ELSE to_date(timestamp_seconds(try_cast(raw_date as long))) END
  ELSE NULL END
)
"""

# every received record classified into exactly one bucket (kept => reason NULL)
_reason_expr = """
CASE
  WHEN order_id IS NULL OR trim(order_id) = '' THEN 'missing_order_id'
  WHEN rn > 1 THEN 'duplicate_resend'
  WHEN effective_amount IS NULL THEN 'invalid_amount'
  WHEN event_date IS NULL THEN 'invalid_date'
  ELSE NULL
END
"""


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_enriched")
def orders_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA_PATH)
    j = (raw.where(F.length(F.trim(F.col("value"))) > 0)
            .select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"),
                    F.from_json(F.col("value"), _schema).alias("j")))
    base = j.select(
        F.col("_raw"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.order_id"), F.col("j.id")).alias("order_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.amount"), F.col("j.total"), F.col("j.value")).alias("amount_str"),
        F.col("j.category").alias("category"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_date"), F.col("j.date"), F.col("j.order_date"),
                   F.col("j.created_at"), F.col("j.event_time"),
                   F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")).alias("raw_date"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.line_items"), F.col("j.items")).alias("items"),
    )
    base = (base
        .withColumn("line_total", F.expr(_line_total_expr))
        .withColumn("stated", F.expr(_stated_expr))
        .withColumn("effective_amount", F.round(F.coalesce(F.col("line_total"), F.col("stated")), 2))
        .withColumn("event_date", F.expr(_date_expr)))
    # deterministic dedup of re-sends: keep first by raw payload within each order_id
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(F.col("_raw"))
    base = base.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    base = base.withColumn("reason", F.expr(_reason_expr))
    return base.select(
        "order_id", "category", "event_date", "amount_str",
        F.col("effective_amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("effective_amount").alias("revenue"),
        "reason",
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, ArrayType

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed27182.ndjson"

_ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", StringType()),
    StructField("qty", StringType()),
    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("unit_price", StringType()),
])
_SCHEMA = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()),
    StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("orderId", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),
    StructField("total", StringType()),
    StructField("order_amount", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()),
    StructField("cat", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),
    StructField("event_timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()),
    StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("order_date", StringType()),
    StructField("order_ts", StringType()),
    StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(_ITEM)),
])


def _clean_num(c):
    return F.regexp_replace(c.cast("string"), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")


def _item_val(x):
    price = F.coalesce(_clean_num(x["price"]).cast("double"),
                       _clean_num(x["unit_price"]).cast("double"), F.lit(0.0))
    qty = F.coalesce(_clean_num(x["quantity"]).cast("double"),
                     _clean_num(x["qty"]).cast("double"), F.lit(1.0))
    return price * qty


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    parsed = (spark.read.text(DATA)
              .select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), _SCHEMA).alias("j"),
                      F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
              .select("raw_line", "j.*"))

    items_col = F.coalesce(F.col("line_items"), F.col("items"))
    item_total = F.aggregate(F.transform(items_col, _item_val),
                             F.lit(0.0), lambda a, b: a + b)
    has_items = items_col.isNotNull() & (F.size(items_col) > 0)

    amt_num = _clean_num(F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.col("total"),
                                    F.col("order_amount"))).cast("double")

    ts = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("event_timestamp"),
                    F.col("timestamp"), F.col("ts"), F.col("order_ts"),
                    F.col("created_at"), F.col("order_date"),
                    F.col("date"), F.col("event_date"))
    is_date_only = ts.rlike(r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$")
    is_sec = ts.rlike(r"^\d{10}$")
    is_ms = ts.rlike(r"^\d{13}$")
    epoch_sec = (F.when(is_sec, ts.cast("long"))
                  .when(is_ms, (ts.cast("long") / 1000).cast("long"))
                  .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(ts))))
    day_num = F.floor(epoch_sec / F.lit(86400)).cast("int")
    event_date = F.when(is_date_only, F.to_date(ts)).otherwise(
        F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day_num))

    b = parsed.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.col("id"), F.col("orderId")).alias("order_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("category"), F.col("cat")).alias("category"),
        F.when(has_items, item_total).otherwise(amt_num).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
    )

    base_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == ""),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    return b.withColumn("base_reason", base_reason)


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_classified")
def orders_classified():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    b = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders")
    w = (Window.partitionBy("order_id")
         .orderBy(F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
                  F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
                  F.col("raw_line").asc_nulls_last()))
    rn = F.row_number().over(w)
    reason = (F.when(F.col("base_reason").isNotNull(), F.col("base_reason"))
               .when(rn > 1, F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
               .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    return b.withColumn("reason", reason)
