from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F, types as T

DATA = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed31415.ndjson"

# Explicit superset schema -> no inference job (stays lazy), missing fields become null.
_item = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("quantity", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("qty", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("price", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("unit_price", T.DoubleType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.DoubleType()),
])

SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("order_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("amount", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("category", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("timestamp", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("ts", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("order_date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("created_at", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("date", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("line_items", T.ArrayType(_item)),
    T.StructField("items", T.ArrayType(_item)),
])

CLASSIFIED = "spark_catalog.default.classified_orders"


@dp.materialized_view(name="classified_orders")
def classified_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(SCHEMA).json(DATA)

    oid = F.coalesce(F.col("order_id"), F.col("id"))

    # itemized total = sum(quantity * price) over line items
    items = F.coalesce(F.col("line_items"), F.col("items"))
    has_items = items.isNotNull() & (F.size(items) > 0)
    line_total = F.aggregate(
        items,
        F.lit(0.0),
        lambda acc, x: acc + (
            F.coalesce(x["quantity"], x["qty"], F.lit(1.0)) *
            F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"], x["amount"], F.lit(0.0))
        ),
    )

    # scalar amount: strip currency symbols / thousands separators
    scalar_amount = F.regexp_replace(F.col("amount"), "[^0-9.\\-]", "").cast("double")

    amount = F.round(F.when(has_items, line_total).otherwise(scalar_amount), 2)

    # UTC calendar day WITHOUT mutating session timezone:
    # derive an absolute epoch (seconds) then floor-divide by 86400 to get UTC days.
    raw_date = F.coalesce(
        F.col("event_date"), F.col("timestamp"), F.col("ts"),
        F.col("order_date"), F.col("created_at"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("date"),
    )
    epoch = F.coalesce(
        F.when(raw_date.rlike("^[0-9]{13}$"), raw_date.cast("double") / 1000.0),
        F.when(raw_date.rlike("^[0-9]{10}$"), raw_date.cast("double")),
        F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(raw_date)).cast("double"),
    )
    event_date = F.date_add(
        F.lit("1970-01-01").cast("date"),
        F.floor(epoch / 86400.0).cast("int"),
    )

    is_valid = oid.isNotNull() & amount.isNotNull() & event_date.isNotNull()

    base = df.select(
        oid.alias("order_id"),
        amount.alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").alias("category"),
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        epoch.alias("epoch"),
        is_valid.alias("is_valid"),
    )

    # deterministic dedup: valid rows first, then latest epoch / largest amount / category
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("is_valid").desc(),
        F.col("epoch").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("category").asc_nulls_last(),
    )
    ranked = base.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("missing_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_resend"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    return ranked.withColumn("reject_reason", reason)


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CLASSIFIED)
    return (df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
              .select("order_id", "amount", "category"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CLASSIFIED)
    kept = df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    # order-grain detail; revenue = the order's true line-item total (amount).
    # Daily published total = sum(revenue) grouped by event_date, which ties
    # exactly to the kept orders' amounts by construction.
    return kept.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table(CLASSIFIED)
    rej = df.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
    return rej.select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date",
        F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed16180.ndjson"

# All fields declared as STRING (and line items as nested structs) so that every
# referenced column always exists even when the raw record omits it or emits a
# different type. Nothing is hard-cast; parsing happens later via try_cast.
_LI = "STRUCT<quantity STRING, qty STRING, price STRING, unit_price STRING, amount STRING>"
SCHEMA = (
    "order_id STRING, amount STRING, category STRING, "
    "event_date STRING, event_time STRING, ts STRING, timestamp STRING, "
    "order_date STRING, order_ts STRING, "
    f"line_items ARRAY<{_LI}>, items ARRAY<{_LI}>"
)

# Deterministic dedup / ranking order (re-sent orders => keep exactly one).
_W = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
    F.col("amount").desc_nulls_last(),
    F.col("event_date").asc_nulls_last(),
    F.col("raw_value").asc_nulls_last(),
)


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_orders")
def bronze_orders():
    # One row per received line; malformed JSON -> null struct (still counted).
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA_PATH)
    return raw.select(
        F.col("value").alias("raw_value"),
        F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA).alias("o"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_orders")
def parsed_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.bronze_orders").select("raw_value", "o.*")

    # Itemized total: sum(quantity * price) over line items, all via try_cast.
    df = df.withColumn("_li", F.coalesce(F.col("line_items"), F.col("items")))
    li_total = F.when(
        F.col("_li").isNotNull() & (F.size("_li") > 0),
        F.expr(
            """
            aggregate(_li, cast(0.0 as double),
              (acc, x) -> acc +
                coalesce(try_cast(x.quantity as double), try_cast(x.qty as double), 1.0) *
                coalesce(try_cast(x.price as double), try_cast(x.unit_price as double),
                         try_cast(x.amount as double), 0.0))
            """
        ),
    )
    amount_val = F.coalesce(li_total, F.expr("try_cast(amount as double)"))

    # Date normalized to a UTC calendar day; tolerate ISO strings and epoch s/ms.
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_dstr",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("event_date"), F.col("event_time"), F.col("ts"),
            F.col("timestamp"), F.col("order_date"), F.col("order_ts"),
        ),
    )
    ts = F.expr(
        """
        coalesce(
          try_cast(_dstr as timestamp),
          case when try_cast(_dstr as long) is not null then
            case when try_cast(_dstr as long) > 100000000000
              then try_cast(from_unixtime(try_cast(_dstr as long) / 1000) as timestamp)
              else try_cast(from_unixtime(try_cast(_dstr as long)) as timestamp)
            end
          end)
        """
    )

    df = df.withColumn("amount", amount_val)
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.to_date(ts))

    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
        .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_amount"))
        .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
        .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("reject_reason", reason)

    return df.select(
        "raw_value",
        F.col("order_id").cast("string").alias("order_id"),
        F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
        "event_date",
        "reject_reason",
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="kept_orders")
def kept_orders():
    # Valid records, one row per order_id (winner of the deterministic window).
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    valid = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed_orders").where(
        F.col("reject_reason").isNull()
    )
    ranked = valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(_W))
    return ranked.where(F.col("_rn") == 1).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "event_date"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_orders")
def silver_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.kept_orders").select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    # Per-kept-order rows carrying the day's total revenue (ties to kept orders).
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    k = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.kept_orders")
    revenue = F.sum("amount").over(Window.partitionBy("event_date"))
    return k.withColumn("revenue", revenue.cast("double")).select(
        "event_date", "revenue", "order_id", "amount", "category"
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    # Reconciles with received: invalid records + surplus duplicate copies.
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed_orders")

    invalid = p.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull()).select(
        "order_id", "amount", "category", "raw_value", "reject_reason"
    )

    valid = p.where(F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    dups = (
        valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(_W))
        .where(F.col("_rn") > 1)
        .select(
            "order_id", "amount", "category", "raw_value",
            F.lit("duplicate_order").alias("reject_reason"),
        )
    )
    return invalid.unionByName(dups)

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, ArrayType

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.supplemental/_data/gen_messy_orders_seed14142.ndjson"

# ---- Permissive schemas: unknown keys -> null, no runtime error --------------
ITEM = StructType([
    StructField("quantity", StringType()), StructField("qty", StringType()),
    StructField("count", StringType()),    StructField("price", StringType()),
    StructField("unit_price", StringType()),StructField("unitPrice", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),   StructField("line_total", StringType()),
])
ORDER = StructType([
    StructField("order_id", StringType()), StructField("id", StringType()),
    StructField("orderId", StringType()),
    StructField("amount", StringType()),   StructField("total", StringType()),
    StructField("order_amount", StringType()),
    StructField("category", StringType()), StructField("cat", StringType()),
    StructField("event_date", StringType()),StructField("date", StringType()),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType()), StructField("ts", StringType()),
    StructField("event_time", StringType()),StructField("created_at", StringType()),
    StructField("line_items", ArrayType(ITEM)),
    StructField("items", ArrayType(ITEM)),
    StructField("lineItems", ArrayType(ITEM)),
])


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_bronze")
def orders_bronze():
    # lazy text read: one raw JSON line per row in column "value"
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA_PATH)


@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_parsed")
def orders_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("orders_bronze")

    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), ORDER)
    df = df.select("value", j.alias("j"))

    order_id = F.coalesce(F.col("j.order_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("j.orderId"))
    category = F.coalesce(F.col("j.category"), F.col("j.cat"))
    line_items = F.coalesce(F.col("j.line_items"), F.col("j.items"), F.col("j.lineItems"))
    dstr = F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_date"), F.col("j.date"), F.col("j.timestamp"),
                      F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.created_at"))
    json_ok = F.col("j").isNotNull()

    df = df.withColumn("order_id", order_id) \
           .withColumn("category", category) \
           .withColumn("line_items", line_items) \
           .withColumn("dstr", dstr) \
           .withColumn("json_ok", json_ok)

    # --- stated amount: strip currency formatting, tolerate nulls -------------
    amt_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("j.amount"), F.col("j.total"), F.col("j.order_amount"))
    amt_clean = F.regexp_replace(F.coalesce(amt_raw, F.lit("")), r"[^0-9.\-]", "")
    stated_amount = F.when(amt_clean == "", None).otherwise(amt_clean.cast("double"))
    df = df.withColumn("stated_amount", stated_amount)

    # --- itemized value: sum(qty * price) over the array (null-safe) ----------
    items_total = F.expr("""
        aggregate(line_items, CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE),
          (acc, x) -> acc
            + coalesce(cast(x.quantity as double), cast(x.qty as double),
                       cast(x.count as double), 1.0)
            * coalesce(cast(x.price as double), cast(x.unit_price as double),
                       cast(x.unitPrice as double), cast(x.amount as double),
                       cast(x.line_total as double), 0.0))
    """)
    has_items = F.expr("line_items is not null and size(line_items) > 0")
    df = df.withColumn("has_items", has_items) \
           .withColumn("items_total", items_total)

    # true reconciled value: line-item total when itemized, else stated amount
    amount = F.when(F.col("has_items"), F.col("items_total")).otherwise(F.col("stated_amount"))
    df = df.withColumn("amount", amount)

    # --- UTC calendar day, timezone-independent -------------------------------
    digits = F.expr("dstr rlike '^[0-9]+$'")
    epoch_date = F.expr("""
        date_add(DATE'1970-01-01',
          CAST(floor((CASE WHEN length(dstr) >= 13 THEN cast(dstr as double)/1000
                           ELSE cast(dstr as double) END) / 86400) AS INT))
    """)
    iso_date = F.expr("to_date(regexp_extract(dstr, '(\\\\d{4}-\\\\d{2}-\\\\d{2})', 1))")
    event_date = F.when(F.col("dstr").isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("date")) \
                  .when(digits, epoch_date).otherwise(iso_date)
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", event_date)

    # --- deterministic de-dup of re-sends -------------------------------------
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_date").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("value").desc())
    rn = F.when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.row_number().over(w))
    df = df.withColumn("rn", rn)

    # --- classification: every row is kept OR rejected-with-reason ------------
    reason = (
        F.when(~F.col("json_ok") | F.col("order_id").isNull(),
               F.lit("missing_or_unparseable_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_date"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("unvaluable_amount"))
         .when(F.col("rn") > 1, F.lit("duplicate_resend"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )
    df = df.withColumn("reject_reason", reason)

    return df.select("value", "order_id", "category", "amount",
                     "event_date", "reject_reason")

    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("orders_parsed")

                      "category"))
